(** Definitions of various kinds of _fibrations_, using displayed categories. *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence. (* only coercions *)
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.MonoEpiIso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Presheaf.
Local Open Scope cat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Opposite.

Local Open Scope type_scope.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.
(*
Local Open Scope hide_transport_scope.
*)
(** Fibratons, opfibrations, and isofibrations are all displayed categories with extra lifting conditions.

Classically, these lifting conditions are usually taken by default as mere existence conditions; when they are given by operations, one speaks of a _cloven_ fibration, etc.

We make the cloven version the default, so [is_fibration] etc are the cloven notions, and call the mere-existence versions _un-cloven_.

(This conventional is provisional and and might change in future.) *)

(** * Isofibrations *)

(** The easiest to define are _isofibrations_, since they do not depend on a definition of (co-)cartesian-ness (because all displayed isomorphisms are cartesian). *)

Section Isofibrations.

(** Given an iso φ : c' =~ c in C, and an object d in D c,
there’s some object d' in D c', and an iso φbar : d' =~ d over φ.
*)

Definition iso_cleaving {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  forall (c c' : C) (i : z_iso c' c) (d : D c),
          ∑ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d' d.

Definition iso_fibration (C : category) : UU
  := ∑ D : disp_cat C, iso_cleaving D.

Definition is_uncloven_iso_cleaving {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  forall (c c' : C) (i : z_iso c' c) (d : D c),
          ∃ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d' d.

Definition weak_iso_fibration (C : category) : UU
  := ∑ D : disp_cat C, is_uncloven_iso_cleaving D.


(** As with fibrations, there is an evident dual version.  However, in the iso case, it is self-dual: having forward (i.e. cocartesian) liftings along isos is equivalent to having backward (cartesian) liftings. *)

Definition is_op_isofibration {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  forall (c c' : C) (i : z_iso c c') (d : D c),
          ∑ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d d'.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
iso_cleaving D <-> is_op_isofibration D


C: category
D: disp_cat C
iso_cleaving D <-> is_op_isofibration D

  (* TODO: give this! *)
Abort.

End Isofibrations.

(** * Fibrations *)
Section Fibrations.

Definition is_cartesian {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c c' : C} {f : c' --> c}
    {d : D c} {d' : D c'} (ff : d' -->[f] d)
  : UU
:= forall c'' (g : c'' --> c') (d'' : D c'') (hh : d'' -->[g·f] d),
  ∃! (gg : d'' -->[g] d'), gg ;; ff = hh.

(** See also [cartesian_factorisation'] below, for when the map one wishes to factor is not judgementally over [g;;f], but over some equal map. *)
Definition cartesian_factorisation {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c c' : C} {f : c' --> c}
    {d : D c} {d' : D c'} {ff : d' -->[f] d} (H : is_cartesian ff)
    {c''} (g : c'' --> c') {d'' : D c''} (hh : d'' -->[g·f] d)
  : d'' -->[g] d'
:= pr1 (pr1 (H _ g _ hh)).

Definition cartesian_factorisation_commutes
    {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c c' : C} {f : c' --> c}
    {d : D c} {d' : D c'} {ff : d' -->[f] d} (H : is_cartesian ff)
    {c''} (g : c'' --> c') {d'' : D c''} (hh : d'' -->[g·f] d)
  : cartesian_factorisation H g hh ;; ff = hh
:= pr2 (pr1 (H _ g _ hh)).

(** While [cartesian_factorisation_commutes] shows that composition with and factorisation through a cartesian morphism are one-sided inverses in one direction, the following shows the other direction. **)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
gg = cartesian_factorisation H g (gg ;; ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
gg = cartesian_factorisation H g (gg ;; ff)

  exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 (H _ _ _ _) (_,, idpath _))).
Defined.

(** This is essentially the third access function for [is_cartesian], but given in a more usable form than [pr2 (H …)] would be. *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff → gg = gg'


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff → gg = gg'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
gg = gg'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
gg = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
cartesian_factorisation H g (gg ;; ff) = gg'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
cartesian_factorisation H g (gg ;; ff) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'': D c''
gg, gg': d'' -->[ g] d'
Hggff: gg ;; ff = gg' ;; ff
cartesian_factorisation H g (gg' ;; ff) = gg'

  apply pathsinv0, cartesian_factorisation_of_composite.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c'', c ⟧
d'': D c''
hh: d'' -->[ h] d
e: g · f = h
d'' -->[ g] d'


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c'', c ⟧
d'': D c''
hh: d'' -->[ h] d
e: g · f = h
d'' -->[ g] d'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c'', c ⟧
d'': D c''
hh: d'' -->[ h] d
e: g · f = h
d'' -->[ g · f] d

  exact (transportb _ e hh).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c'', c ⟧
d'': D c''
hh: d'' -->[ h] d
e: g · f = h
cartesian_factorisation' H g hh e ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp d'' d) e hh


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
H: is_cartesian ff
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c'', c ⟧
d'': D c''
hh: d'' -->[ h] d
e: g · f = h
cartesian_factorisation' H g hh e ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp d'' d) e hh

  apply cartesian_factorisation_commutes.
Qed.

Definition cartesian_lift {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c} (d : D c) {c' : C} (f : c' --> c)
  : UU
:= ∑ (d' : D c') (ff : d' -->[f] d), is_cartesian ff.

Definition object_of_cartesian_lift  {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c} (d : D c) {c' : C} (f : c' --> c)
    (fd : cartesian_lift d f)
  : D c'
:= pr1 fd.
Coercion object_of_cartesian_lift : cartesian_lift >-> ob_disp.

Definition mor_disp_of_cartesian_lift  {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c} (d : D c) {c' : C} (f : c' --> c)
    (fd : cartesian_lift d f)
  : (fd : D c') -->[f] d
:= pr1 (pr2 fd).
Coercion mor_disp_of_cartesian_lift : cartesian_lift >-> mor_disp.

Definition cartesian_lift_is_cartesian {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
    {c} (d : D c) {c' : C} (f : c' --> c)
    (fd : cartesian_lift d f)
  : is_cartesian fd
:= pr2 (pr2 fd).
Coercion cartesian_lift_is_cartesian : cartesian_lift >-> is_cartesian.

Definition is_cartesian_disp_functor
  {C C' : category} {F : functor C C'}
  {D : disp_cat C} {D' : disp_cat C'} (FF : disp_functor F D D') : UU
:= ∏  (c c' : C) (f : c' --> c)
      (d : D c) (d' : D c') (ff : d' -->[f] d),
   is_cartesian ff -> is_cartesian (♯ FF ff).


C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_cartesian_disp_functor (disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_cartesian_disp_functor (disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ (disp_functor_identity D) ff)

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ (disp_functor_composite FF GG) ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG)


C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (♯ (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG) ff)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.

Definition cartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (D₁ : disp_cat C₁)
           (D₂ : disp_cat C₂)
  : UU
  := ∑ (FF : disp_functor F D₁ D₂), is_cartesian_disp_functor FF.

Coercion disp_functor_of_cartesian_disp_functor
         {C₁ C₂ : category}
         {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
         {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
         {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
         (FF : cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
  : disp_functor F D₁ D₂
  := pr1 FF.

Definition make_cartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (FF : disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
           (HFF : is_cartesian_disp_functor FF)
  : cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
  := FF ,, HFF.

Definition cartesian_disp_functor_is_cartesian
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (FF : cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
  : is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
  := pr2 FF.

Definition cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (FF : cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
           {x y : C₁}
           {f : x --> y}
           {xx : D₁ x}
           {yy : D₁ y}
           {ff : xx -->[ f ] yy}
           (Hff : is_cartesian ff)
  : is_cartesian (♯FF ff)
  := pr2 FF y x f yy xx ff Hff.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cartesian_disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_cartesian_disp_functor ?FF

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D
 exact (disp_functor_identity D).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_cartesian_disp_functor (disp_functor_identity D)
 apply disp_functor_identity_is_cartesian_disp_functor.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
cartesian_disp_functor (F ∙ G) D₁ D₃


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
cartesian_disp_functor (F ∙ G) D₁ D₃

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_functor (F ∙ G) D₁ D₃
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
is_cartesian_disp_functor ?FF

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
disp_functor (F ∙ G) D₁ D₃
 exact (disp_functor_composite FF GG).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: cartesian_disp_functor G D₂ D₃
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)
 exact (disp_functor_composite_is_cartesian_disp_functor
             (cartesian_disp_functor_is_cartesian FF)
             (cartesian_disp_functor_is_cartesian GG)).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
isaprop (is_cartesian ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
isaprop (is_cartesian ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff: d' -->[ f] d
t: C
t0: C ⟦ t, c' ⟧
t1: D t
t2: t1 -->[ t0 · f] d
isaprop (∃! gg : t1 -->[ t0] d', gg ;; ff = t2)

  apply isapropiscontr.
Defined.



C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_cartesian_disp_functor FF)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_cartesian_disp_functor FF)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
t, t0: C₁
t1: C₁ ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t2: D₁ t
t3: D₁ t0
t4: t3 -->[ t1] t2
t5: is_cartesian t4
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : is_cartesian t4, is_cartesian (♯ FF t4)) t5)

  apply isaprop_is_cartesian.
Qed.

(* TODO: should the arguments be re-ordered as in [cartesian_lift]? If so, reorder in [isofibration] etc as well, for consistency. *)
(* TODO: consider renaming to e.g. [cleaving] to follow convention that [is_] is reserved for hprops. *)
Definition cleaving {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  forall (c c' : C) (f : c' --> c) (d : D c), cartesian_lift d f.

(** ** (Cloven) fibration *)

Definition fibration (C : category) : UU
:=
  ∑ D : disp_cat C, cleaving D.


(** ** Weak fibration *)

(* TODO: give access functions! *)

Definition is_cleaving {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  forall (c c' : C) (f : c' --> c) (d : D c), ∥ cartesian_lift d f ∥.

Definition weak_fibration (C : category) : UU
:= ∑ D : disp_cat C, is_cleaving D.

(** ** Connection with isofibrations *)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
is_cartesian ff → is_z_iso_disp i ff

?pr1 ;; ff =

inv_from_z_iso i · i = identity c

    apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
cartesian_factorisation' Hff (inv_from_z_iso i)
  (id_disp d) (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp d d) (pr2 i) (id_disp d)
 apply cartesian_factorisation_commutes'.

        (id_disp d) (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) =

ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  (maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i))
  (ff ;; id_disp d) =
transportf (mor_disp d' d) ?e ?y'

c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff =
transportb (mor_disp d' d') (pr1 i) (id_disp d') ;; ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportb (mor_disp d' d') (pr1 i) (id_disp d') ;; ff =
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff

?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
?b =
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (i · inv_from_z_iso i) i (! pr1 i))
  (id_disp d' ;; ff) =
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (i · inv_from_z_iso i) i (! pr1 i))
  (id_disp d' ;; ff) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
?b =
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
d': pr1 D c'
ff: d' -->[ i] d
Hff: is_cartesian ff
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  (! id_left i @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (i · inv_from_z_iso i) i (! pr1 i)) ff =
transportf (mor_disp d' d)
  ((! id_right i @
    maponpaths (compose i) (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)) @
   assoc i (inv_from_z_iso i) i) ff

    apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D → iso_cleaving D


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D → iso_cleaving D

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_fib: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: z_iso c' c
d: D c
∑ d' : D c', z_iso_disp f d' d

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_fib: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: z_iso c' c
d: D c
fd: cartesian_lift d f
∑ d' : D c', z_iso_disp f d' d

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_fib: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: z_iso c' c
d: D c
fd: cartesian_lift d f
z_iso_disp f fd d

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_fib: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: z_iso c' c
d: D c
fd: cartesian_lift d f
is_z_iso_disp f fd

  apply is_z_iso_from_is_cartesian; exact fd.
Defined.

(** ** Uniqueness of cartesian lifts *)

(* TODO: show that when [D] is _univalent_, cartesian lifts are literally unique, and so any uncloven fibration (isofibration, etc) is in fact cloven. *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') fd fd'


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') fd fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
fd -->[ identity_z_iso c'] fd'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
fd' -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')] fd
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
(λ gg : fd' -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')] fd,
 is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso c') ?pr1 gg) ?pr10

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
fd -->[ identity_z_iso c'] fd'
 exact (cartesian_factorisation' fd' (identity _) fd (id_left _)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
fd' -->[ inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')] fd
 exact (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity _) fd' (id_left _)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
(λ gg : fd' -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')] fd,
 is_disp_inverse (identity_z_iso c')
   (cartesian_factorisation' fd' (identity c') fd
      (id_left f)) gg)
  (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
     (id_left f))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
  (id_left f) ;; cartesian_factorisation' fd'
                   (identity c') fd (id_left f) =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd')
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_factorisation' fd' (identity c') fd
  (id_left f) ;; cartesian_factorisation' fd
                   (identity c') fd' (id_left f) =
transportb (mor_disp fd fd)
  (pr1 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C

fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
  (id_left f) ;; cartesian_factorisation' fd'
                   (identity c') fd (id_left f) =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd')

d: D c
c': C

fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
  (id_left f) ;; cartesian_factorisation' fd'
                   (identity c') fd (id_left f) ;; fd' =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
     (id_left f) ;; (cartesian_factorisation' fd'
                       (identity c') fd (id_left f) ;; fd')) =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

c: C
d: D c

transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
     (id_left f) ;; transportb (mor_disp fd d)
                      (id_left f) fd) =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
     (id_left f) ;; transportb (mor_disp fd d)

c': C

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity c')) (! id_left f) @
   assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_factorisation' fd (identity c') fd'
     (id_left f) ;; fd) =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity c')) (! id_left f) @
   assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (transportb (mor_disp fd' d) (id_left f) fd') =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd' d)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity c')) (! id_left f) @
   assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (transportb (mor_disp fd' d) (id_left f) fd') = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
transportb (mor_disp fd' fd')
  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

   maponpaths (compose (identity c')) (! id_left f) @
   assoc (identity c') (identity c') f) fd' =

  (pr2 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd') ;; fd'

C: category

d: D c

  (id_left f) ;; cartesian_factorisation' fd
                   (identity c') fd' (id_left f) =
transportb (mor_disp fd fd)
  (pr1 (id_left (identity c'),, id_left (identity c')))
  (id_disp fd)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; fd' =
transportb (mor_disp fd d) (id_left f)
  (fd : fd -->[ f] d)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; fd' =
transportb (mor_disp fd d) (id_left f)
  (fd : fd -->[ f] d)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_factorisation' fd' (identity c') fd
  (id_left f) ;; fd' =
transportb (mor_disp fd d) (id_left f) fd
 apply cartesian_factorisation_commutes'.
Qed.

(** In a displayed _category_ (i.e. _univalent_), cartesian lifts are literally unique, if they exist; that is, the type of cartesian lifts is always a proposition. *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
isaprop (cartesian_lift d f)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
isaprop (cartesian_lift d f)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
fd = fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1 fd = pr1 fd'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf
  (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff) 
  ?p (pr2 fd) = pr2 fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1 fd = pr1 fd'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') (pr1 fd) (pr1 fd')

    apply cartesian_lifts_iso. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf
  (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
  (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
     (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd'
      :
      z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath c')) (pr1 fd)
        (pr1 fd'))) (pr2 fd) = pr2 fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
isPredicate is_cartesian
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
     (isotoid_disp D_cat 
        (idpath c') (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd'))
     (pr2 fd)) = pr12 fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
isPredicate is_cartesian
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
ff: pr1 fd' -->[ f] d
isaprop (is_cartesian ff)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
ff: pr1 fd' -->[ f] d
t: C
t0: C ⟦ t, c' ⟧
t1: D t
t2: t1 -->[ t0 · f] d
isofhlevel 1
  (∃! gg : t1 -->[ t0] pr1 fd', gg ;; ff = t2)

    apply isapropiscontr. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
     (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
        (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd')) (pr2 fd)) =
pr12 fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
     (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
        (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd')) (pr2 fd)) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b = pr12 fd'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ x : D c', ∑ ff : x -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
     (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
        (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd')) (pr2 fd)) = 
?b
 exact (! transport_map (λ x:D c', pr1) _ _). 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (λ x : D c', x -->[ f] d)
  (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
     (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd'))
  ((λ x : D c', pr1) (pr1 fd) (pr2 fd)) = pr12 fd'

     (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd')) (pr12 fd) =
pr12 fd'

D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c

f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) (id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c')
        (isotoid_disp D_cat (idpath c')
           (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd'))) ;; pr12 fd) =
pr12 fd'

     (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd') ;; pr12 fd) =

c: C
d: D c

f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧

z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd') ;; pr12 fd =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) (id_left f)
  (pr12 fd')

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
                                 (cartesian_lifts_iso
                                    fd fd') ;; pr12 fd) =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd')

D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; 
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) 
  (id_left f) (pr12 fd')
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportb (mor_disp fd d)
  (assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
                                   (cartesian_lifts_iso
                                      fd fd') ;; pr12 fd) =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd')

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportb (mor_disp fd d)
  (assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
                                   (cartesian_lifts_iso
                                      fd fd') ;; pr12 fd) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; 
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) 
  (id_left f) (pr12 fd')
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
                                (cartesian_lifts_iso
                                   fd fd') =
transportf (mor_disp fd (pr1 fd)) ?e ?ff'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (cancel_postcomposition 
     ?f' (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f 
     ?e @ ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (?ff' ;; pr12 fd) =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; 
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) 
  (id_left f) (pr12 fd')

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (id_disp fd ;; pr12 fd) =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd')

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (id_disp fd ;; pr12 fd) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; 
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d) 
  (id_left f) (pr12 fd')
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd) =
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd')

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd') =
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; transportb
                                (mor_disp (pr1 fd') d)
                                (id_left f) (pr12 fd') =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity c') (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity_z_iso c'))
     (! id_left f))
  (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; pr12 fd') =
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity_z_iso c'))
     (! id_left f))
  (cartesian_lifts_iso fd fd' ;; pr12 fd') = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
?b =
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity c') (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
c: C
d: D c
c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
fd, fd': cartesian_lift d f
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity_z_iso c'))
     (! id_left f)) fd =
transportf (mor_disp fd d)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity c')
     (identity_z_iso c' · identity c') f
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso c')) @
   ! assoc (identity_z_iso c') (identity c') f)
  (pr12 fd)

  apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
is_cleaving D → cleaving D


C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
is_cleaving D → cleaving D

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
D_fib: is_cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
cartesian_lift d f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
D_fib: is_cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
isaprop (cartesian_lift d f)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
D_fib: is_cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
cartesian_lift d f → cartesian_lift d f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
D_cat: is_univalent_disp D
D_fib: is_cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
cartesian_lift d f → cartesian_lift d f

  auto.
Defined.

End Fibrations.


C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
isaprop (cleaving D)


C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
isaprop (cleaving D)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t2: D t
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t2 : D t, cartesian_lift t2 t1) t2)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t2: D t
is_univalent_disp D

  exact HD.
Defined.

Section Discrete_Fibrations.

Definition is_discrete_fibration {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) : UU
:=
  (forall (c c' : C) (f : c' --> c) (d : D c),
          ∃! d' : D c', d' -->[f] d)
  ×
  (forall c, isaset (D c)).

Definition discrete_fibration C : UU
  := ∑ D : disp_cat C, is_discrete_fibration D.

Coercion disp_cat_from_discrete_fibration C (D : discrete_fibration C)
  : disp_cat C := pr1 D.
Definition unique_lift {C} {D : discrete_fibration C} {c c'}
           (f : c' --> c) (d : D c)
  : ∃! d' : D c', d' -->[f] d
  := pr1 (pr2 D) c c' f d.
Definition isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration {C} (D : discrete_fibration C)
           (c : C) : isaset (D c) := pr2 (pr2 D) c.

(** TODO: move upstream *)

A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
a,, b = a,, b' → b = b'


A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
a,, b = a,, b' → b = b'

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
H: a,, b = a,, b'
b = b'

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
H: a,, b = a,, b'
isincl (tpair B a)

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
H: a,, b = a,, b'
∏ x' : A, isofhlevel 1 (x' = a)
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isaset A
a: A
b, b': B a
H: a,, b = a,, b'
x': A
isofhlevel 1 (x' = a)
 apply is.
Defined.


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧) (d : D c) (d' : D c')
(ff ff' : d -->[ f] d'), ff = ff'


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧) (d : D c) (d' : D c')
(ff ff' : d -->[ f] d'), ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'
ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'
d,, ff = d,, ff'
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'
foo: (d,, ff : ∑ d0 : pr1 D c, d0 -->[ f] d') = d,, ff'
ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c

XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'

C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'
∃! d0 : pr1 D c, d0 -->[ f] d'
 apply XR. 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
d: D c
d': D c'
ff, ff': d -->[ f] d'
XR: ∃! d'0 : D c, d'0 -->[ f] d'
foo: (d,, ff : ∑ d0 : pr1 D c, d0 -->[ f] d') = d,, ff'
ff = ff'

  apply (pair_inj (isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration _ _ ) foo).
Defined.


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧) (d : D c) (d' : D c'),
isaprop (d -->[ f] d')

D: discrete_fibration C
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧) (d : D c) (d' : D c'),
isaprop (d -->[ f] d')

D: discrete_fibration C

f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧

 apply disp_mor_unique_disc_fib.
Qed.

  ?pr1

D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
D c'
 exact (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))).
  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
(λ d' : D c', ∑ ff : d' -->[ f] d, is_cartesian ff)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))

C: category

 is_cartesian ff) ?pr1

f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)) -->[ f] d
 exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))).
    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
(λ ff : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)) -->[ f] d,
 is_cartesian ff) (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
∃! gg : db -->[ g] pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)),
gg ;; pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)) = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): (λ d' : D c', d' -->[ f] d)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))
∃! gg : db -->[ g] pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)),
gg ;; ff = hh
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)) -->[ f] d
∃! gg : db -->[ g] pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)),
gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): (λ d' : D c'', d' -->[ g · f] d)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)))
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) -->[
g · f] d
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): (λ d'0 : D c'', d'0 -->[ g] d')
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')))
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
d'',, ggff = db,, hh
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
XR: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
db,, hh
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
∃! r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d
 apply (pr2 D).

C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
XR: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
db,, hh
XR1: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
d3,, gg ;; ff
XT: pr1 (d'',, ggff) = pr1 (db,, hh)
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'

db,, hh
XR1: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
d3,, gg ;; ff
XT: d'' = db
∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧

d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'

d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''

C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
XR: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
db,, hh
XR1: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
d3,, gg ;; ff
XT: d'' = db
XT1: d'' = d3
d'',, ggff = db,, hh
→ ∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
db: D c''
hh: db -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
XR: (d'',, ggff : ∑ r : pr1 D c'', r -->[ g · f] d) =
db,, hh
XT: d'' = db
XT1: d'' = d3
d'',, ggff = d3,, gg ;; ff
→ d'',, ggff = db,, hh
  → ∃! gg : db -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
gg:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): d3 -->[ g] d'
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
XT1: d'' = d3
d'',, ggff = d3,, gg ;; ff
→ d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
  → ∃! gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
d3:= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): D c''
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
XT1: d'' = d3
∏ gg : d3 -->[ g] d',
d'',, ggff = d3,, gg ;; ff
→ d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
  → ∃! gg0 : d'' -->[ g] d', gg0 ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
∏ gg : d'' -->[ g] d',
d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
→ d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
  → ∃! gg0 : d'' -->[ g] d', gg0 ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
∃! gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh

      
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
isaprop (∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh)

ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d

C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh)

        
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
x, x': ∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
x = x'
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
x, x': ∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
isPredicate (λ x : d'' -->[ g] d', x ;; ff = hh)
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
x, x': ∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
pr1 x = pr1 x'

        
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: D c
c'': C
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d'':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): D c''
hh: d'' -->[ g · f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): D c'
ff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)): d' -->[ f] d
ggff:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)): d'' -->[ g · f] d
XR: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
gg: d'' -->[ g] d'
XR1: d'',, ggff = d'',, gg ;; ff
XR0: d'',, ggff = d'',, hh
x, x': ∑ gg : d'' -->[ g] d', gg ;; ff = hh
isPredicate (λ x : d'' -->[ g] d', x ;; ff = hh)

Section Equivalence_disc_fibs_presheaves.

(* GOAL: correspondence between discrete fibrations and presheaves.

Outline via categories:

- show that the fibers of a discrete fibration are (discrete categories on) sets, and that the disp morphism types are props;
- define the category of discrete fibrations over C, using [disp_functor_id] for morphisms, and with [homset_property] coming from the previous point;
- construct equivalence of cats; probably easiest by explicit functors and natural isos (not by “ess split” plus “full and faithful”);
- show [disc_fib_precat C] is univalent (possibly _using_ the above equivalence of cats, to get “isos of displayed cats are weq to isos btn associated presheaves”?);
- conclude equivalence of types.

More direct equivalence of types:

- ?

 *)


Variable C : category.


C: category
precategory_ob_mor


C: category
precategory_ob_mor

  
C: category
discrete_fibration C → discrete_fibration C → UU

  
C: category
a, b: discrete_fibration C
UU
 exact (disp_functor (functor_identity _ ) a b).
Defined.


C: category
precategory_data


C: category
precategory_data

  
C: category
precategory_id_comp precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor

  
C: category
∏ c : precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor,
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ c, c ⟧
C: category
∏ a b c : precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor,
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, c ⟧

  
C: category
∏ c : precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor,
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ c, c ⟧
 
C: category
c: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ c, c ⟧

    exact (@disp_functor_identity _ _ ).
  
C: category
∏ a b c : precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor,
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, c ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
f: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ b, c ⟧
precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact (disp_functor_composite f g ).
Defined.


C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
a = b


C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
a = b

  
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
isPredicate disp_functor_axioms
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
pr1 a = pr1 b

  
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
isPredicate disp_functor_axioms
 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
x: disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) F G
isaprop (disp_functor_axioms x)
 apply isaprop_disp_functor_axioms. 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
pr1 a = pr1 b

  
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
pr11 a = pr11 b
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C, F x → G (functor_identity C x),
   ∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : F x0) (yy : F y)
   (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] x y yy) ?p
  (pr21 a) = pr21 b

  
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
pr11 a = pr11 b
 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
pr11 a ~ pr11 b
 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
x: C
(pr11 a) x = (pr11 b) x

    
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
x: C
(pr11 a) x ~ (pr11 b) x
 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
x: C
y: F x
(pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y

    apply H.
  
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C, F x → G (functor_identity C x),
   ∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : F x0) (yy : F y)
   (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] x y yy)
  (funextsec (λ t : C, F t → G (functor_identity C t))
     (pr11 a) (pr11 b)
     ((λ x : C,
       funextsec (λ _ : F x, G (functor_identity C x))
         ((pr11 a) x) ((pr11 b) x)
         ((λ y : F x, H x y) : (pr11 a) x ~ (pr11 b) x))
      :
      pr11 a ~ pr11 b)) (pr21 a) = pr21 b
 
C: category
F, G: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor
a, b: precat_of_discrete_fibs_ob_mor ⟦ F, G ⟧
H: ∏ (x : C) (y : F x), (pr11 a) x y = (pr11 b) x y
x, x0: C
x1: F x
x2: F x0
x3: C ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
x4: x1 -->[ x3] x2
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C, F x → G (functor_identity C x),
   ∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : F x0) (yy : F y)
   (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] x y yy)
  (funextsec (λ t : C, F t → G (functor_identity C t))
     (pr11 a) (pr11 b)
     (λ x : C,
      funextsec (λ _ : F x, G (functor_identity C x))
        ((pr11 a) x) ((pr11 b) x) (λ y : F x, H x y)))
  (pr21 a) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 =
(pr21 b) x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

    apply disp_mor_unique_disc_fib.
Qed.


C: category
is_precategory precat_of_discrete_fibs_data


C: category
is_precategory precat_of_discrete_fibs_data

  repeat split; intros;
  apply eq_discrete_fib_mor; intros; apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition precat_of_discrete_fibs : precategory
  := (_ ,, precat_axioms_of_discrete_fibs).


C: category
has_homsets precat_of_discrete_fibs


C: category
has_homsets precat_of_discrete_fibs

  
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
isaset (precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ f, f' ⟧)

  
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
isofhlevel 2
  (disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f')
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f',
isofhlevel 2 (disp_functor_axioms x)

  
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
isofhlevel 2
  (disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f')
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
isofhlevel 2
  (∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x))
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : ∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x),
isofhlevel 2
  (∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : f x0) (yy : f y)
   (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f0] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f0] x y yy)

    
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
isofhlevel 2
  (∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x))
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
t: C
t0: f t
isofhlevel 2 (f' (functor_identity C t))

      apply isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration.
    
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : ∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x),
isofhlevel 2
  (∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : f x0) (yy : f y)
   (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f0] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f0] x y yy)
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: ∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x)
isofhlevel 2
  (∏ (x0 y : C) (xx : f x0) (yy : f y)
   (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   xx -->[ f0] yy
   → x x0 xx -->[
     (# (functor_identity C))%cat f0] x y yy)
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: ∏ x : C, f x → f' (functor_identity C x)
t, t0: C
t1: f t
t2: f t0
t3: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t4: t1 -->[ t3] t2
isofhlevel 2
  (x t t1 -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat t3] x t0 t2)

      apply homsets_disp.
  
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f',
isofhlevel 2 (disp_functor_axioms x)
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f'
isofhlevel 2 (disp_functor_axioms x)
 
C: category
f, f': precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) f f'
isaprop (disp_functor_axioms x)
 apply isaprop_disp_functor_axioms.
Qed.

Definition Precat_of_discrete_fibs : category
  := ( precat_of_discrete_fibs ,, has_homsets_precat_of_discrete_fibs).

(** ** Functor from discrete fibrations to presheaves *)

(** *** Functor on objects *)

(* TODO: split into data and properties *)



C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
functor_data C^op HSET_univalent_category


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
functor_data C^op HSET_univalent_category

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
C^op → HSET_univalent_category
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
(λ F : C^op → HSET_univalent_category,
 ∏ a b : C^op,
 C^op ⟦ a, b ⟧ → HSET_univalent_category ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
C^op → HSET_univalent_category
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
HSET_univalent_category
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
isaset (D c)
 apply  isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration.
  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
(λ F : C^op → HSET_univalent_category,
 ∏ a b : C^op,
 C^op ⟦ a, b ⟧ → HSET_univalent_category ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ c : C^op,
   D c,, isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration D c)
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c', c: C^op
f: C^op ⟦ c', c ⟧
x: D c',, isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration D c'
D c,, isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration D c
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c', c: C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: D c'
D c

    exact (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))).
Defined.


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
is_functor (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)


C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
is_functor (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)

  
C: category

functor_idax (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
functor_compax (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)

  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
functor_idax (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
(λ x : D c,
 pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) x))) =
(λ x : D c, x)

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
x: D c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) x)) = x
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
x: D c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) x)) = x

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
x: D c
x = pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) x))
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c: C^op
x: D c
x -->[ identity c] x

      apply id_disp.
  
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
functor_compax (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D)
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C^op
f: C^op ⟦ c, c' ⟧
g: C^op ⟦ c', c'' ⟧
(# (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D))%cat (f · g) =
(# (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D))%cat f
· (# (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob D))%cat g
 
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
(λ x : D c, pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) x))) =
(λ x : D c,
 pr1
   (iscontrpr1
      (unique_lift g
         (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))))))

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) x)) =
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x)))))

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) x))

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))))) -->[
g · f] x

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))))) -->[
g] ?yy
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
?yy -->[ f] x

    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x))))) -->[
g] ?yy
 apply (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g _))).
    
C: category
D: discrete_fibration C
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
x: D c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f x)) -->[ f] x
 apply (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f _ ))).
Qed.

Definition preshv_from_disc_fib_ob (D : discrete_fibration C)
  : PreShv C := (_ ,, preshv_ax_from_disc_fib_ob D).

(** *** Functor on morphisms *)


C: category
functor_data Precat_of_discrete_fibs [C^op, SET]


C: category
functor_data Precat_of_discrete_fibs [C^op, SET]

  
C: category
∏ a b : Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ [C^op, SET] ⟦ preshv_from_disc_fib_ob a,
  preshv_from_disc_fib_ob b ⟧

  
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
[C^op, SET] ⟦ preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D,
preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D' ⟧

  
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
nat_trans_data (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
  (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D')
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
         (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D'),
 is_nat_trans (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
   (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D') t) ?pr1

  
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
nat_trans_data (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
  (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D')
 
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
c: C^op
SET ⟦ preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D c,
preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D' c ⟧
 
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
c: C^op
D c → D' c

    exact (pr1 a c).
  
C: category
D, D': Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, D' ⟧
(λ t : nat_trans_data (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
         (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D'),
 is_nat_trans (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
   (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D') t)
  ((λ c : C^op,
    pr1 a c
    :
    SET ⟦ preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D c,
    preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D' c ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
     (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D'))
 abstract (
        intros x y f; cbn in *;
        apply funextsec; intro d;
        apply path_to_ctr;
        apply ♯a;
        apply (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f _ )))
      ).
Defined.

(** *** Functor properties *)


C: category
is_functor foo


C: category
is_functor foo

  
C: category
functor_idax foo
C: category
functor_compax foo

  
C: category
functor_idax foo
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(# foo)%cat (identity D) = identity (foo D)
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
has_homsets SET
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : C^op,
(# foo)%cat (identity D) x = identity (foo D) x
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
has_homsets SET
 apply has_homsets_HSET. 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : C^op,
(# foo)%cat (identity D) x = identity (foo D) x

    
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
c: C^op
(# foo)%cat (identity D) c = identity (foo D) c
 apply idpath.
  
C: category
functor_compax foo
 
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
(# foo)%cat (a · b) = (# foo)%cat a · (# foo)%cat b
 
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
has_homsets SET
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
∏ x : C^op,
(# foo)%cat (a · b) x =
((# foo)%cat a · (# foo)%cat b) x
 
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
has_homsets SET
 apply has_homsets_HSET. 
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
∏ x : C^op,
(# foo)%cat (a · b) x =
((# foo)%cat a · (# foo)%cat b) x

    
C: category
D, E, F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
a: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ D, E ⟧
b: Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ E, F ⟧
c: C^op
(# foo)%cat (a · b) c =
((# foo)%cat a · (# foo)%cat b) c
 apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs : functor _ _
  := ( _ ,, bar).

(** ** Functor from presheaves to discrete fibrations *)

(** *** Functor on objects *)

(* TODO: split into data and properties *)

C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat C


C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat C

  
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_data C
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_axioms C ?pr1

  
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_data C
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_ob_mor C
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_id_comp C ?pr1

    
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_ob_mor C
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ x y : C, pr1 D x → pr1 D y → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
x, y: C
c: pr1 D x
d: pr1 D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
UU
 exact (functor_on_morphisms (pr1 D) f d = c).
    
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_id_comp C
  ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
   (λ (x y : C) (c : pr1 D x) (d : pr1 D y)
    (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = c))
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (x : C)
(xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y)
        (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = c)) x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        x)
(yy : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        y)
(zz : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (x : C)
(xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y)
        (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = c)) x),
xx -->[ identity x] xx
 intros; cbn in *; apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (functor_id D x ) _ ).
      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        x)
(yy : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        y)
(zz : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
       (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y0)
        (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c))
        z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 intros ? ? ? ? ? ? ? ? X X0; cbn in *;
        etrans; [apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (functor_comp D g f ) _ ) |];
        cbn; etrans; [ apply maponpaths; apply X0 |]; (* here maponpaths depends on cbn *)
        apply X.
  
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat_axioms C
  (((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
    (λ (x y : C) (c : pr1 D x) (d : pr1 D y)
     (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = c)),,
   (λ (x : C)
    (xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
           (λ (x0 y : C) (c : pr1 D x0) (d : pr1 D y)
            (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧), (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = c))
            x),
    toforallpaths (λ _ : D x, D x)
      ((# D)%cat (identity x)) (identity (D x))
      (functor_id D x) xx
    :
    xx -->[ identity x] xx),,
   (λ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
    (xx : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
           (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0)
            (d : pr1 D y0) (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
            (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c)) x)
    (yy : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
           (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0)
            (d : pr1 D y0) (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
            (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c)) y)
    (zz : ((λ c : C^op, pr1 D c),,
           (λ (x0 y0 : C) (c : pr1 D x0)
            (d : pr1 D y0) (f0 : C ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
            (# (pr1 D))%cat f0 d = c)) z)
    (X : xx -->[ f] yy) (X0 : yy -->[ g] zz),
    toforallpaths (λ _ : D z, D x) ((# D)%cat (g · f))
      ((# D)%cat g · (# D)%cat f) (functor_comp D g f)
      zz @
    (maponpaths ((# D)%cat f) X0 @ X
     :
     ((# D)%cat g · (# D)%cat f) zz = xx)
    :
    xx -->[ f · g] zz))
 abstract (
         repeat use tpair; cbn; intros; try apply setproperty;
         apply isasetaprop; apply setproperty
       ).
Defined.


C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
discrete_fibration C


C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
discrete_fibration C

D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat C

D: [C^op, SET]
(λ D : disp_cat C, is_discrete_fibration D) ?pr1

D: [C^op, SET]
disp_cat C
 apply (disp_cat_from_preshv D).
