(λ D : disp_cat C, is_discrete_fibration D)
  (disp_cat_from_preshv D)
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
is_discrete_fibration (disp_cat_from_preshv D)

    
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c', c ⟧)
(d : disp_cat_from_preshv D c),
∃! d' : disp_cat_from_preshv D c', d' -->[ f] d
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ c : C, isaset (disp_cat_from_preshv D c)

    
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ (c c' : C) (f : C ⟦ c', c ⟧)
(d : disp_cat_from_preshv D c),
∃! d' : disp_cat_from_preshv D c', d' -->[ f] d
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∃! d' : disp_cat_from_preshv D c', d' -->[ f] d
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∃! d' : pr1 D c', (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = d'

      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
pr1 D c'
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
(# (pr1 D))%cat f d = ?x
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∏ y : pr1 D c', isaprop ((# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y)
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∏ y : pr1 D c', (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y → y = ?x

      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
pr1 D c'
 apply (functor_on_morphisms (pr1 D) f d).
      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
(# (pr1 D))%cat f d = (# (pr1 D))%cat f d
 apply idpath.
      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∏ y : pr1 D c', isaprop ((# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y)
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
y: pr1 D c'
isaprop ((# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y)
 apply setproperty.
      
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
∏ y : pr1 D c',
(# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y → y = (# (pr1 D))%cat f d
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
y: pr1 D c'
X: (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y
y = (# (pr1 D))%cat f d
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]

d: disp_cat_from_preshv D c
y: pr1 D c'
X: (# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y
(# (pr1 D))%cat f d = y
 assumption.
    
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
∏ c : C, isaset (disp_cat_from_preshv D c)
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c: C
isaset (disp_cat_from_preshv D c)
 
C: category
D: [C^op, SET]
c: C
isaset (pr1 D c)
 apply setproperty.
Defined.

(** *** Functor on morphisms *)


C: category
functor_data [C^op, SET] Precat_of_discrete_fibs


C: category
functor_data [C^op, SET] Precat_of_discrete_fibs

  
C: category
[C^op, SET] → Precat_of_discrete_fibs
C: category
(λ F : [C^op, SET] → Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
 ∏ a b : [C^op, SET],
 [C^op, SET] ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) ?pr1

  
C: category
[C^op, SET] → Precat_of_discrete_fibs
 apply disc_fib_from_preshv.
  
C: category
(λ F : [C^op, SET] → Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
 ∏ a b : [C^op, SET],
 [C^op, SET] ⟦ a, b ⟧
 → Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  disc_fib_from_preshv
 
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟦ disc_fib_from_preshv F,
disc_fib_from_preshv G ⟧

    
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (disc_fib_from_preshv F) (disc_fib_from_preshv G)
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
          (disc_fib_from_preshv F)
          (disc_fib_from_preshv G),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
  (disc_fib_from_preshv F) (disc_fib_from_preshv G)
 
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ x : C,
disc_fib_from_preshv F x
→ disc_fib_from_preshv G (functor_identity C x)
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         disc_fib_from_preshv F x
         → disc_fib_from_preshv G
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : disc_fib_from_preshv F x)
 (yy : disc_fib_from_preshv F y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

      
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ x : C,
disc_fib_from_preshv F x
→ disc_fib_from_preshv G (functor_identity C x)
 
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
c: C
disc_fib_from_preshv F c
→ disc_fib_from_preshv G (functor_identity C c)
 apply (pr1 a c).
      
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         disc_fib_from_preshv F x
         → disc_fib_from_preshv G
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : disc_fib_from_preshv F x)
 (yy : disc_fib_from_preshv F y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ c : C, pr1 a c)
 intros x y X Y f H;
        assert (XR := nat_trans_ax a);
        apply pathsinv0; etrans; [|apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (XR _ _ f))];
        cbn; apply maponpaths, (!H).
    
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
          (disc_fib_from_preshv F)
          (disc_fib_from_preshv G),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  ((λ c : C, pr1 a c),,
   ((λ (x y : C) (X : disc_fib_from_preshv F x)
     (Y : disc_fib_from_preshv F y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
     (H : X -->[ f] Y),
     let XR := nat_trans_ax a in
     ! ((maponpaths (a x) (! H)
         :
         pr1 a x X = ((# F)%cat f · a x) Y) @
        toforallpaths (λ _ : F y, G x)
          ((# F)%cat f · a x) (a y · (# G)%cat f)
          (XR y x f) Y))
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
             disc_fib_from_preshv F x
             → disc_fib_from_preshv G
                 (functor_identity C x),
     ∏ (x y : C) (xx : disc_fib_from_preshv F x)
     (yy : disc_fib_from_preshv F y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy
     → Fob x xx -->[
       (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
      (λ c : C, pr1 a c)))
  
C: category
F, G: [C^op, SET]
a: [C^op, SET] ⟦ F, G ⟧
disp_functor_axioms
  ((λ c : C, pr1 a c),,
   (λ (x y : C) (X : pr1 F x) (Y : pr1 F y)
    (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (H : (# (pr1 F))%cat f Y = X),
    ! (maponpaths (a x) (! H) @
       toforallpaths (λ _ : F y, G x)
         (λ x0 : F y, a x ((# F)%cat f x0))
         (λ x0 : F y, (# G)%cat f (a y x0))
         (nat_trans_ax a y x f) Y)))
 abstract (repeat use tpair; cbn; intros; apply setproperty).
Defined.

(** *** Functor properties *)


C: category
is_functor functor_data_preShv_Disc_fibs


C: category
is_functor functor_data_preShv_Disc_fibs

  split; unfold functor_idax, functor_compax; intros;
  apply eq_discrete_fib_mor; intros; apply idpath.
Qed.


Definition functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs : functor _ _
  := ( _ ,,  is_functor_functor_data_preShv_Disc_fibs ).

F: [C^op, SET]
∏ x : opp_precat_data C,
hset_precategory_data ⟦ F x,
preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob (disc_fib_from_preshv F)
  x ⟧
 
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
∏ x : C, F x → pr1 F x
 intro c; apply idfun.
    
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
(λ t : nat_trans_data F
         (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
            (disc_fib_from_preshv F)),
 is_nat_trans F
   (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
      (disc_fib_from_preshv F)) t)
  (((λ c : C, idfun (F c))
    :
    ∏ x : opp_precat_data C,
    hset_precategory_data ⟦ F x,
    preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
      (disc_fib_from_preshv F) x ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data F
     (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
        (disc_fib_from_preshv F)))
 
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
c, c': opp_precat_data C
f: opp_precat_data C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
(# F)%cat f · idfun (F c') =
idfun (F c)
· (# (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
        (disc_fib_from_preshv F)))%cat f
 
C: category
F: opp_precat_data C ⟶ hset_precategory_data
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
(λ x : F c, (# F)%cat f x) =
(λ x : F c, (# (pr1 F))%cat f x)
 apply idpath.
  
C: category
(λ t : nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C^op, SET])
         (functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
          ∙ functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs),
 is_nat_trans (functor_identity [C^op, SET])
   (functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
    ∙ functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs) t)
  ((λ F : [C^op, SET],
    (((λ c : C, idfun (F c))
      :
      ∏ x : opp_precat_data C,
      hset_precategory_data ⟦ F x,
      preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
        (disc_fib_from_preshv F) x ⟧)
     :
     nat_trans_data F
       (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
          (disc_fib_from_preshv F))),,
    ((λ (c c' : opp_precat_data C)
      (f : opp_precat_data C ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
      idpath (λ x : F c, (# (pr1 F))%cat f x)
      :
      (# F)%cat f · idfun (F c') =
      idfun (F c)
      · (# (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
              (disc_fib_from_preshv F)))%cat f)
     :
     (λ t : nat_trans_data F
              (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
                 (disc_fib_from_preshv F)),
      is_nat_trans F
        (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
           (disc_fib_from_preshv F)) t)
       (((λ c : C, idfun (F c))
         :
         ∏ x : opp_precat_data C,
         hset_precategory_data ⟦ F x,
         preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
           (disc_fib_from_preshv F) x ⟧)
        :
        nat_trans_data F
          (preshv_data_from_disc_fib_ob
             (disc_fib_from_preshv F))))
    :
    [C^op, SET] ⟦ functor_identity [C^op, SET] F,
    (functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
     ∙ functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs) F ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity [C^op, SET])
     (functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
      ∙ functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs))
 abstract (
        intros F G a;
        apply nat_trans_eq; [ apply has_homsets_HSET |];
        intro c ; apply idpath
      ).
Defined.

→ xx -->[ f] yy
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
c, c': C
x: D c
y: D c'
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
H: pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) = x
x -->[ f] y

D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
c, c': C
x: D c
y: D c'
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
H: pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) = x
XR:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)): (λ d' : D c, d' -->[ f] y)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)))
x -->[ f] y
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
c, c': C
x: D c
y: D c'
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
H: pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) = x
XR:= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) -->[ f] y
x -->[ f] y

        apply (transportf (λ t, t -->[f] y) H XR).
    
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C)
          ((functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
            ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D)
          (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
    :
    ∏ x : C,
    (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
     ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
    → functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
        (functor_identity C x)),,
   ((λ (c c' : C) (x : D c) (y : D c')
     (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧)
     (H : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) = x),
     let XR := pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) in
     transportf (λ t : pr1 D c, t -->[ f] y) H XR)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
             (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
              ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
             → functor_identity
                 Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
                 (functor_identity C x),
     ∏ (x y : C)
     (xx : (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
            ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x)
     (yy : (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
            ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D y)
     (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy
     → Fob x xx -->[
       (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
      ((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
       :
       ∏ x : C,
       (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
        ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
       → functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
           (functor_identity C x))))
 abstract (split; cbn; intros; apply  disp_mor_unique_disc_fib).
  
C: category
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
          ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs)
         (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
    ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs)
   (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs) t)
  ((λ D : Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
    (((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
      :
      ∏ x : C,
      (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
       ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
      → functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
          (functor_identity C x)),,
     ((λ (c c' : C) (x : D c) (y : D c')
       (f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧)
       (H : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) = x),
       let XR := pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f y)) in
       transportf (λ t : pr1 D c, t -->[ f] y) H XR)
      :
      (λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
               (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
                ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
               → functor_identity
                   Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
                   (functor_identity C x),
       ∏ (x y : C)
       (xx : (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
              ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x)
       (yy : (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
              ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D y)
       (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       xx -->[ f] yy
       → Fob x xx -->[
         (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
        ((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
         :
         ∏ x : C,
         (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
          ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D x
         → functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D
             (functor_identity C x)))),,
    ε_disc_fib_subproof D)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
      ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs)
     (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs))
 abstract (intros c c' f; apply eq_discrete_fib_mor; intros; apply idpath).
Defined.

         D x
         → disp_cat_from_preshv
             (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

      
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : C,
D x
→ disp_cat_from_preshv (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
    (functor_identity C x)
 
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ x : C, D x → D x
 intro c; apply idfun.
      
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C,
         D x
         → disp_cat_from_preshv
             (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
             (functor_identity C x),
 ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (functor_identity C))%cat f] Fob y yy)
  ((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
   :
   ∏ x : C,
   D x
   → disp_cat_from_preshv (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
       (functor_identity C x))
 abstract (
            intros c c' x y f H; cbn;
            apply pathsinv0; apply path_to_ctr; apply H
          ).
    
C: category
D: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(λ FF : disp_functor_data (functor_identity C) D
          (disp_cat_from_preshv
             (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  (((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
    :
    ∏ x : C,
    D x
    → disp_cat_from_preshv (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
        (functor_identity C x)),,
   ε_inv_disc_fib_subproof D)
 abstract (
          split;
          [ intros x y; apply isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration |];
          intros; apply isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration
        ).
  
C: category
(λ t : nat_trans_data
         (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs)
         (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
          ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs),
 is_nat_trans
   (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs)
   (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
    ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) t)
  ((λ D : Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
    (((λ c : C, idfun (D c))
      :
      ∏ x : C,
      D x
      → disp_cat_from_preshv
          (preshv_from_disc_fib_ob D)
          (functor_identity C x)),,
     ε_inv_disc_fib_subproof D),,
    ε_inv_disc_fib_subproof0 D
    :
    Precat_of_discrete_fibs
    ⟦ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs D,
    (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
     ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs) D ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs)
     (functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
      ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs))
 abstract (intros c c' f; apply eq_discrete_fib_mor; intros; apply idpath).
Defined.



C: category
adjunction_data [C^op, SET] Precat_of_discrete_fibs


C: category
adjunction_data [C^op, SET] Precat_of_discrete_fibs

  
C: category
∑ G : Precat_of_discrete_fibs ⟶ [C^op, SET],
functor_identity [C^op, SET]
⟹ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs ∙ G
× G ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
  ⟹ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs

  
C: category
functor_identity [C^op, SET]
⟹ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
  ∙ functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
× functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
  ∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
  ⟹ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs

  
C: category
functor_Disc_Fibs_to_preShvs
∙ functor_preShvs_to_Disc_Fibs
⟹ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs

  exact  ε_disc_fib.
Defined.


C: category
forms_equivalence adjunction_data_disc_fib


C: category
forms_equivalence adjunction_data_disc_fib

  
C: category
∏ a : [C^op, SET],
is_z_isomorphism (adjunit adjunction_data_disc_fib a)
C: category
∏ b : Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib b)

  
C: category
∏ a : [C^op, SET],
is_z_isomorphism (adjunit adjunction_data_disc_fib a)
 
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
is_z_isomorphism (adjunit adjunction_data_disc_fib F)

    
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1 (adjunit adjunction_data_disc_fib F))

    
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
c: C^op
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (adjunit adjunction_data_disc_fib F) c)
 
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
c: C^op
is_z_isomorphism (idfun (F c))

    
C: category
F: [C^op, SET]
c: C^op
XR:= hset_equiv_is_z_iso (pr1 F c) (pr1 F c)
  (idweq (pr1 F c : hSet)): is_z_isomorphism (pr1 (idweq (pr1 F c : hSet)))
is_z_isomorphism (idfun (F c))

    apply XR.
  
C: category
∏ b : Precat_of_discrete_fibs,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib b)
 
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F)

    
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
Precat_of_discrete_fibs
⟦ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F,
(pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
 ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F ⟧
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F · ?pr1 =
identity
  ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
    ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F)
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(λ _ : adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F · ?pr1 =
       identity
         ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
           ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F),
 ?pr1 · adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F =
 identity (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F))
  ?pr10

    
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
Precat_of_discrete_fibs
⟦ functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F,
(pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
 ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F ⟧
 apply ε_inv_disc_fib.
    
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F
· (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F) =
identity
  ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
    ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F)
 
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ (x : C)
(y : (pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
      ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F x),
(pr11 (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F
       · (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F))) x y =
(pr11 (identity
         ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
           ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F))) x y

      
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: C
y: (pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
 ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F x
(pr11 (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F
       · (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F))) x y =
(pr11 (identity
         ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
           ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F))) x y
 apply idpath.
    
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
(λ _ : adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F
       · (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F) =
       identity
         ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
           ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F),
 (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F)
 · adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F =
 identity (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F))
  (eq_discrete_fib_mor
     ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
       ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F)
     ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
       ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F)
     (adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F
      · (let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F))
     (identity
        ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
          ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F))
     (λ (x : C)
      (y : (pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
            ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F x),
      idpath
        ((pr11 (identity
                  ((pr12 adjunction_data_disc_fib
                    ∙ pr1 adjunction_data_disc_fib) F)))
           x y)))
 
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
∏ (x : C)
(y : functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F x),
(pr11 ((let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F)
       · adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F)) x y =
(pr11 (identity
         (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F)))
  x y

      
C: category
F: Precat_of_discrete_fibs
x: C
y: functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F x
(pr11 ((let X := pr1 ε_inv_disc_fib in X F)
       · adjcounit adjunction_data_disc_fib F)) x y =
(pr11 (identity
         (functor_identity Precat_of_discrete_fibs F)))
  x y
 apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition adj_equivalence_disc_fib : adj_equivalence_of_cats _ :=
  adjointification (_ ,, forms_equivalence_disc_fib).

End Equivalence_disc_fibs_presheaves.

End Discrete_Fibrations.

(**
 The notion of an opcartesian morphism
 *)
Section Opcartesian.
  Context {C : category}
          {D : disp_cat C}.

  Definition is_opcartesian
             {c₁ c₂ : C}
             {f : c₁ --> c₂}
             {cc₁ : D c₁}
             {cc₂ : D c₂}
             (ff : cc₁ -->[ f ] cc₂)
    : UU
    := ∏ (c₃ : C)
         (cc₃ : D c₃)
         (g : c₂ --> c₃)
         (hh : cc₁ -->[ f · g ] cc₃),
       ∃! (gg : cc₂ -->[ g ] cc₃),
       ff ;; gg = hh.

  Section ProjectionsOpcartesian.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : C}
            {f : c₁ --> c₂}
            {cc₁ : D c₁}
            {cc₂ : D c₂}
            {ff : cc₁ -->[ f ] cc₂}
            (Hff : is_opcartesian ff)
            {c₃ : C}
            {cc₃ : D c₃}
            (g : c₂ --> c₃)
            (hh : cc₁ -->[ f · g ] cc₃).

    Definition opcartesian_factorisation
      : cc₂ -->[ g ] cc₃
      := pr11 (Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh).

    Definition opcartesian_factorisation_commutes
      : ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation = hh
      := pr21 (Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh).

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
c₃: C
cc₃: D c₃
g: C ⟦ c₂, c₃ ⟧
hh: cc₁ -->[ f · g] cc₃
gg₁, gg₂: cc₂ -->[ g] cc₃
H: ff ;; gg₁ = ff ;; gg₂
gg₁ = gg₂

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
c₃: C
cc₃: D c₃
g: C ⟦ c₂, c₃ ⟧
hh: cc₁ -->[ f · g] cc₃
gg₁, gg₂: cc₂ -->[ g] cc₃
H: ff ;; gg₁ = ff ;; gg₂
gg₁ = gg₂

      exact (maponpaths
               pr1
               (proofirrelevance
               _
               (isapropifcontr
                  (Hff c₃ cc₃ g (ff ;; gg₁)))
               (gg₁ ,, idpath _)
               (gg₂ ,, !H))).
    Qed.
  End ProjectionsOpcartesian.
End Opcartesian.

(**
 Opcartesian morphism
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff ≃ is_opcartesian ff


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff ≃ is_opcartesian ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff → is_opcartesian ff
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isweq ?f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff → is_opcartesian ff
 exact (λ Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh, Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isweq
  (λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
   (cc₃ : op_disp_cat D c₃) (g : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₃ ⟧)
   (hh : cc₂ -->[ f · g] cc₃), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_opcartesian ff → is_cartesian ff
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ x : is_cartesian ff,
?g
  ((λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
    (cc₃ : op_disp_cat D c₃) (g : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₃ ⟧)
    (hh : cc₂ -->[ f · g] cc₃), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) x) =
x
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ y : is_opcartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
 (cc₃ : op_disp_cat D c₃) (g : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₃ ⟧)
 (hh : cc₂ -->[ f · g] cc₃), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) (?g y) =
y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_opcartesian ff → is_cartesian ff
 exact (λ Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh, Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ x : is_cartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C)
 (cc₃ : C ⟦ c₃, c₁ ⟧) (g : D c₃)
 (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₂), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
  ((λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
    (cc₃ : op_disp_cat D c₃) (g : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₃ ⟧)
    (hh : cc₂ -->[ f · g] cc₃), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) x) =
x
 intro ; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ y : is_opcartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
 (cc₃ : op_disp_cat D c₃) (g : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₃ ⟧)
 (hh : cc₂ -->[ f · g] cc₃), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
  ((λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C)
    (cc₃ : C ⟦ c₃, c₁ ⟧) (g : D c₃)
    (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₂), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) y) =
y
 intro ; apply idpath.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_opcartesian ff ≃ is_cartesian ff


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_opcartesian ff ≃ is_cartesian ff

f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂

f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isweq ?f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_opcartesian ff → is_cartesian ff
 exact (λ Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh, Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isweq
  (λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
   (cc₃ : C^op ⟦ c₃, c₂ ⟧) (g : op_disp_cat D c₃)
   (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₁), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff → is_opcartesian ff
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ x : is_opcartesian ff,
?g
  ((λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
    (cc₃ : C^op ⟦ c₃, c₂ ⟧) (g : op_disp_cat D c₃)
    (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₁), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) x) =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ y : is_cartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
 (cc₃ : C^op ⟦ c₃, c₂ ⟧) (g : op_disp_cat D c₃)
 (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₁), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) (?g y) =
y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
is_cartesian ff → is_opcartesian ff
 exact (λ Hff c₃ cc₃ g hh, Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ x : is_opcartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C) (cc₃ : D c₃)
 (g : C ⟦ c₂, c₃ ⟧) (hh : cc₁ -->[ f · g] cc₃),
 Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
  ((λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
    (cc₃ : C^op ⟦ c₃, c₂ ⟧) (g : op_disp_cat D c₃)
    (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₁), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) x) =
x
 intro ; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
∏ y : is_cartesian ff,
(λ (Hff : is_opcartesian ff) (c₃ : C^op)
 (cc₃ : C^op ⟦ c₃, c₂ ⟧) (g : op_disp_cat D c₃)
 (hh : g -->[ cc₃ · f] cc₁), Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh)
  ((λ (Hff : is_cartesian ff) (c₃ : C) (cc₃ : D c₃)
    (g : C ⟦ c₂, c₃ ⟧) (hh : cc₁ -->[ f · g] cc₃),
    Hff c₃ g cc₃ hh) y) = y
 intro ; apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition is_cartesian_to_is_opcartesian
           {C : category}
           {D : disp_cat C}
           {c₁ c₂ : C}
           {f : c₁ --> c₂}
           {cc₁ : D c₁}
           {cc₂ : D c₂}
           {ff : cc₁ -->[ f ] cc₂}
           (Hff : @is_cartesian _ (op_disp_cat D) _ _ _ _ _ ff)
  : is_opcartesian ff
  := invmap (is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian ff) Hff.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isaprop (is_opcartesian ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isaprop (is_opcartesian ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c₁, c₂: C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
cc₁: D c₁
cc₂: D c₂
ff: cc₁ -->[ f] cc₂
isofhlevel 1 (is_cartesian ff)

  apply isaprop_is_cartesian.
Qed.

(** Opcleavings *)
Section Opcleaving.
  Context {C : category}
          (D : disp_cat C).

  Definition opcartesian_lift
             {c₁ c₂ : C}
             (cc₁ : D c₁)
             (f : c₁ --> c₂)
    : UU
    := ∑ (cc₂ : D c₂) (ff : cc₁ -->[ f ] cc₂), is_opcartesian ff.

  Definition ob_of_opcartesian_lift
             {c₁ c₂ : C}
             {cc₁ : D c₁}
             {f : c₁ --> c₂}
             (ℓ : opcartesian_lift cc₁ f)
    : D c₂
    := pr1 ℓ.

  Definition mor_of_opcartesian_lift
             {c₁ c₂ : C}
             {cc₁ : D c₁}
             {f : c₁ --> c₂}
             (ℓ : opcartesian_lift cc₁ f)
    : cc₁ -->[ f ] ob_of_opcartesian_lift ℓ
    := pr12 ℓ.

  Definition mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
             {c₁ c₂ : C}
             {cc₁ : D c₁}
             {f : c₁ --> c₂}
             (ℓ : opcartesian_lift cc₁ f)
    : is_opcartesian (mor_of_opcartesian_lift ℓ)
    := pr22 ℓ.

  Definition opcleaving
    : UU
    := ∏ (c₁ c₂ : C)
         (cc₁ : D c₁)
         (f : c₁ --> c₂),
       opcartesian_lift cc₁ f.

  Definition is_opcleaving
    : UU
    := ∏ (c₁ c₂ : C)
         (cc₁ : D c₁)
         (f : c₁ --> c₂),
       ∥ opcartesian_lift cc₁ f ∥.
End Opcleaving.

Definition opcleaving_ob
           {C : category}
           {D : disp_cat C}
           (HD : opcleaving D)
           {c c' : C}
           (f : c --> c')
           (d : D c)
  : D c'
  := ob_of_opcartesian_lift _ (HD c c' d f).

Definition opcleaving_mor
           {C : category}
           {D : disp_cat C}
           (HD : opcleaving D)
           {c c' : C}
           (f : c --> c')
           (d : D c)
  : d -->[ f ] opcleaving_ob HD f d
  := mor_of_opcartesian_lift _ (HD c c' d f).


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D ≃ opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D ≃ opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D → opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isweq ?f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving D → opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)
 exact (λ HD c₁ c₂ cc₁ f,
           let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
(* TODO: see #1470 *)
           tpair
             (fun cc₂ => total2 (fun ff => @is_opcartesian _ _ _ _ _ cc₁ cc₂ ff))
             (pr1 ℓ)
             (tpair
                (@is_opcartesian _ _ _ _ _ cc₁ ℓ) (pr12 ℓ)
                (pr1weq (is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ) ℓ))).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isweq
  (λ (HD : cleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
   (cc₁ : op_disp_cat D c₁) (f : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
   let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
   pr1 ℓ,,
   pr12 ℓ,, is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ ℓ)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving (op_disp_cat D) → cleaving D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : cleaving D,
?g
  ((λ (HD : cleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
    (cc₁ : op_disp_cat D c₁) (f : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,, is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ ℓ) x) =
x
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ y : opcleaving (op_disp_cat D),
(λ (HD : cleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
 (cc₁ : op_disp_cat D c₁) (f : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,, pr12 ℓ,, is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ ℓ)
  (?g y) = y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving (op_disp_cat D) → cleaving D
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)
c₁, c₂: C
cc₁: C ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧
f: D c₁
ℓ:= HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁: opcartesian_lift (op_disp_cat D) f cc₁
is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ)

      exact (invmap (is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian _) (pr22 ℓ)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : cleaving D,
(λ (HD : opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)) (c₁ c₂ : C)
 (cc₁ : C ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : D c₁),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,,
 pr12 ℓ,,
 invmap (is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian (pr12 ℓ))
   (pr22 ℓ))
  ((λ (HD : cleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
    (cc₁ : op_disp_cat D c₁) (f : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,, is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ ℓ) x) =
x
 intro ; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ y : opcleaving (op_disp_cat D),
(λ (HD : cleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
 (cc₁ : op_disp_cat D c₁) (f : C^op ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,, pr12 ℓ,, is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian ℓ ℓ)
  ((λ (HD : opcleaving (op_disp_cat D)) (c₁ c₂ : C)
    (cc₁ : C ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : D c₁),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,,
    invmap (is_cartesian_weq_is_opcartesian (pr12 ℓ))
      (pr22 ℓ)) y) = y
 intro ; apply idpath.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving D ≃ cleaving (op_disp_cat D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving D ≃ cleaving (op_disp_cat D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving D → cleaving (op_disp_cat D)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isweq ?f

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
opcleaving D → cleaving (op_disp_cat D)
 exact (λ HD c₁ c₂ cc₁ f,
           let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
(* TODO: see #1470 *)
           tpair
             (fun d' => total2 (fun ff => @is_cartesian _ _ _ _ _ f d' ff))
             (pr1 ℓ)
             (tpair
                (@is_cartesian _ _ _ _ _ f (pr1 ℓ)) (pr12 ℓ)
                (pr1weq
                   (@is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian _ D _ _ _ _ _ (pr12 ℓ))
                   (pr22 ℓ)))).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
isweq
  (λ (HD : opcleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
   (cc₁ : C^op ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : op_disp_cat D c₁),
   let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
   pr1 ℓ,,
   pr12 ℓ,,
   is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ) (pr22 ℓ))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving (op_disp_cat D) → opcleaving D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : opcleaving D,
?g
  ((λ (HD : opcleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
    (cc₁ : C^op ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : op_disp_cat D c₁),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,,
    is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ) (pr22 ℓ))
     x) = x
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ y : cleaving (op_disp_cat D),
(λ (HD : opcleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
 (cc₁ : C^op ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : op_disp_cat D c₁),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,,
 pr12 ℓ,,
 is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ) (pr22 ℓ))
  (?g y) = y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
cleaving (op_disp_cat D) → opcleaving D
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving (op_disp_cat D)
c₁, c₂: C
cc₁: D c₁
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
ℓ:= HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁: cartesian_lift cc₁ f
is_opcartesian (pr12 ℓ)

      exact (invmap (is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian _) (pr22 ℓ)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ x : opcleaving D,
(λ (HD : cleaving (op_disp_cat D)) (c₁ c₂ : C)
 (cc₁ : D c₁) (f : C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,,
 pr12 ℓ,,
 invmap (is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ))
   (pr22 ℓ))
  ((λ (HD : opcleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
    (cc₁ : C^op ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : op_disp_cat D c₁),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,,
    is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ) (pr22 ℓ))
     x) = x
 intro ; apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
∏ y : cleaving (op_disp_cat D),
(λ (HD : opcleaving D) (c₁ c₂ : C^op)
 (cc₁ : C^op ⟦ c₂, c₁ ⟧) (f : op_disp_cat D c₁),
 let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
 pr1 ℓ,,
 pr12 ℓ,,
 is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ) (pr22 ℓ))
  ((λ (HD : cleaving (op_disp_cat D)) (c₁ c₂ : C)
    (cc₁ : D c₁) (f : C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧),
    let ℓ := HD c₁ c₂ f cc₁ in
    pr1 ℓ,,
    pr12 ℓ,,
    invmap (is_opcartesian_weq_is_cartesian (pr12 ℓ))
      (pr22 ℓ)) y) = y
 intro ; apply idpath.
Defined.


C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
isaprop (opcleaving D)


C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
isaprop (opcleaving D)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
isofhlevel 1 (cleaving (op_disp_cat D))

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
is_univalent_disp (op_disp_cat D)

  
C: univalent_category
D: disp_cat C
HD: is_univalent_disp D
is_univalent_disp D

  exact HD.
Defined.


(** Cloven opfibration *)
Definition opfibration
           (C : category)
  : UU
  := ∑ (D : disp_cat C), opcleaving D.

(** Weak opfibration *)
Definition weak_opfibration
           (C : category)
  : UU
  := ∑ (D : disp_cat C), is_opcleaving D.

Definition is_opcartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {D : disp_cat C₁}
           {D' : disp_cat C₂}
           (FF : disp_functor F D D')
  : UU
  := ∏  (c c' : C₁)
        (f : c' --> c)
        (d : D c)
        (d' : D c')
        (ff : d' -->[f] d),
     is_opcartesian ff -> is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff).


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
isaprop (is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
t, t0: C₁
t1: C₁ ⟦ t0, t ⟧
t2: D₁ t
t3: D₁ t0
t4: t3 -->[ t1] t2
t5: is_opcartesian t4
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : is_opcartesian t4, is_opcartesian (♯ FF t4))
     t5)

  apply isaprop_is_opcartesian.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_opcartesian_disp_functor (disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
is_opcartesian_disp_functor (disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ (disp_functor_identity D) ff)

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_composite FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ (disp_functor_composite FF GG) ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
D₃: disp_cat C₃
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor G D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG)


C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian
  (♯ (disp_functor_over_id_composite FF GG) ff)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C: category
D₁, D₂, D₃: disp_cat C
FF: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₁ D₂
GG: disp_functor (functor_identity C) D₂ D₃
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
HGG: is_opcartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.

Definition opcartesian_disp_functor
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (D₁ : disp_cat C₁)
           (D₂ : disp_cat C₂)
  : UU
  := ∑ (FF : disp_functor F D₁ D₂), is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF.

Coercion disp_functor_of_opcartesian_disp_functor
         {C₁ C₂ : category}
         {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
         {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
         {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
         (FF : opcartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
  : disp_functor F D₁ D₂
  := pr1 FF.

Definition opcartesian_disp_functor_is_opcartesian
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
           {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
           (FF : opcartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
  : is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
  := pr2 FF.

(** Opfibrations are isofibrations *)
Section IsoCleavingFromOpcleaving.
  Context {C : category}
          (D : disp_cat C)
          (HD : opcleaving D).

  Section Lift.
    Context {x y : C}
            (f : z_iso x y)
            (d : D y).

    Definition z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
      : D x
      := opcleaving_ob HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d.

    Let ℓ : d -->[ inv_from_z_iso f ] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
      := opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d.
    Let ℓ_opcart : is_opcartesian (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
      := pr22 (HD _ _ d (inv_from_z_iso f)).

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob -->[ f] d

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob -->[ f] d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
d -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · f] d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
inv_from_z_iso f · f = identity y

      apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
    Defined.

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_disp f z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob d

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_disp f z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob -->[ f] d
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
is_z_iso_disp f ?ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob -->[ f] d
 exact z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
is_z_iso_disp f
  z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
?pr1 ;; z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map =
transportb (mor_disp d d) (pr2 f) (id_disp d)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map =
       transportb (mor_disp d d) (pr2 f) (id_disp d),
 z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map ;; 
 ?pr1 =
 transportb
   (mor_disp z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
      z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob) 
   (pr1 f) (id_disp z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob))
  ?pr10

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
 exact ℓ.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
ℓ ;; z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map =
transportb (mor_disp d d) (pr2 f) (id_disp d)
 abstract
            (apply opcartesian_factorisation_commutes).
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: opcleaving D
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
d: D y
ℓ:= opcleaving_mor HD (inv_from_z_iso f) d: d -->[
inv_from_z_iso f] z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
ℓ_opcart:= pr22 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)): is_opcartesian
  (pr12 (HD y x d (inv_from_z_iso f)))
(λ _ : ℓ ;; z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map =
       transportb (mor_disp d d) (pr2 f) (id_disp d),
 z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_map ;; ℓ =
 transportb
   (mor_disp z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob
      z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob) (pr1 f)
   (id_disp z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob))
  z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso_subproof
 abstract
            (apply (opcartesian_factorisation_unique ℓ_opcart) ;
             unfold transportb ;
             rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
             rewrite assoc_disp ;
             unfold transportb ;
             etrans ;
               [ apply maponpaths ;
                 apply maponpaths_2 ;
                 apply (opcartesian_factorisation_commutes ℓ_opcart)
               | ] ;
             unfold transportb ;
             rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
             rewrite id_left_disp, id_right_disp ;
             unfold transportb ;
             rewrite !transport_f_f ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             apply homset_property).
    Defined.
  End Lift.

  Definition iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving
    : iso_cleaving D
    := λ x y f d,
       z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob f d
       ,,
       z_iso_cleaving_from_opcleaving_ob_disp_iso f d.
End IsoCleavingFromOpcleaving.

Section isofibration_from_disp_over_univalent.

Context (C : category)
        (Ccat : is_univalent C)
        (D : disp_cat C).


C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
iso_cleaving D


C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
iso_cleaving D

  
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
∑ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d' d

  
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
D c'
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
(λ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d' d) ?pr1

  
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
D c'
 exact (transportb D (isotoid _ Ccat i) d).
  
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
(λ d' : D c', z_iso_disp i d' d)
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat i) d)
 
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
i: z_iso c' c
d: D c
∏ i : z_iso c' c,
z_iso_disp i (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat i) d) d
 
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
∏ i : z_iso c' c,
z_iso_disp i (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat i) d) d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
is_univalent C
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
∏ e : c' = c,
z_iso_disp (idtoiso e)
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat (idtoiso e)) d) d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
is_univalent C
 apply Ccat. 
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
∏ e : c' = c,
z_iso_disp (idtoiso e)
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat (idtoiso e)) d) d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c, c': C
d: D c
e: c' = c
z_iso_disp (idtoiso e)
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat (idtoiso e)) d) d
 
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c': C
d: D c'
z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath c'))
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat (idtoiso (idpath c')))
     d) d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c': C
d: D c'
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c')
  (transportb D (isotoid C Ccat (identity_z_iso c')) d)
  d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c': C
d: D c'
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c')
  (transportb D (idpath c') d) d

    
C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
D: disp_cat C
c': C
d: D c'
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso c') d d

    apply identity_z_iso_disp.
Defined.

End isofibration_from_disp_over_univalent.

(** * Split fibrations *)

Definition cleaving_ob {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
           (X : cleaving D) {c c' : C} (f : c' --> c) (d : D c)
  : D c' := X _ _ f d.

Definition cleaving_mor {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
           (X : cleaving D) {c c' : C} (f : c' --> c) (d : D c)
  : cleaving_ob X f d -->[f] d := X _ _ f d.

Definition is_split_id {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
           (X : cleaving D) : UU
  := ∏ c (d : D c),
      ∑ e : cleaving_ob X (identity _) d = d,
            cleaving_mor X (identity _) d =
            transportb (λ x, x -->[ _ ] _ ) e (id_disp d).

Definition is_split_comp {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
           (X : cleaving D) : UU
  :=
    ∏ (c c' c'' : C) (f : c' --> c) (g : c'' --> c') (d : D c),
      ∑ e : cleaving_ob X (g · f) d =
                cleaving_ob X g (cleaving_ob X f d),
            cleaving_mor X (g · f) d =
            transportb (λ x, x -->[ _ ] _ ) e
                       (cleaving_mor X g (cleaving_ob X f d) ;;
                                     cleaving_mor X f d).

Definition is_split {C : category} {D : disp_cat C}
           (X : cleaving D) : UU
  := is_split_id X × is_split_comp X × (∏ c, isaset (D c)).



C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))


C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split_id
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split_comp
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
∏ c : C, isaset ((D,, X) c)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split_id
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
∑
e : cleaving_ob
      (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
      (identity c) d = d,
cleaving_mor
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
  (identity c) d =
transportb (λ x : pr1 (D,, X) c, x -->[ identity c] d)
  e (id_disp d)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
∑
e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) = d,
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
transportb (λ x : pr1 D c, x -->[ identity c] d) e
  (id_disp d)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) = d
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
(λ e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
       d,
 pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
 transportb (λ x : pr1 D c, x -->[ identity c] d) e
   (id_disp d)) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) = d
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
d = pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
d -->[ identity c] d

      apply id_disp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
(λ e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
       d,
 pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
 transportb (λ x : pr1 D c, x -->[ identity c] d) e
   (id_disp d))
  (! path_to_ctr (D c)
       (λ a : D c, a -->[ identity c] d)
       (unique_lift (identity c) d) d (id_disp d))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c: C
d: (D,, X) c
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (identity c) d)) =
transportb (λ x : pr1 D c, x -->[ identity c] d)
  (! path_to_ctr (D c)
       (λ a : D c, a -->[ identity c] d)
       (unique_lift (identity c) d) d (id_disp d))
  (id_disp d)

      apply  (disp_mor_unique_disc_fib _ (D,,X)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
is_split_comp
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
∑
e : cleaving_ob
      (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
      (g · f) d =
    cleaving_ob
      (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X)) g
      (cleaving_ob
         (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
         f d),
cleaving_mor
  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
  (g · f) d =
transportb (λ x : pr1 (D,, X) c'', x -->[ g · f] d) e
  (cleaving_mor
     (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X)) g
     (cleaving_ob
        (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C (D,, X))
        f d) ;; cleaving_mor
                  (fibration_from_discrete_fibration C
                     (D,, X)) f d)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
∑
e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
    pr1
      (iscontrpr1
         (unique_lift g
            (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))),
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
transportb (λ x : pr1 D c'', x -->[ g · f] d) e
  (pr2
     (iscontrpr1
        (unique_lift g
           (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))) ;; 
   pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
(λ e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
       pr1
         (iscontrpr1
            (unique_lift g
               (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))),
 pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
 transportb (λ x : pr1 D c'', x -->[ g · f] d) e
   (pr2
      (iscontrpr1
         (unique_lift g
            (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))) ;; 
    pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g
        (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d)))))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): (λ d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d)
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): (λ d'0 : (D,, X) c'', d'0 -->[ g] d')
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')))
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)),,
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR)))),,
gf'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
X0: pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)),,
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR)))),, gf'
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))


      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)),,
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR)))),,
gf'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
∃! d' : (D,, X) c'', d' -->[ g · f] d
 apply X. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
XR:= unique_lift f d: ∃! d' : (D,, X) c', d' -->[ f] d
d':= pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR): (D,, X) c'
f':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR): pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) -->[ f] d
g':= pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')): pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g] d'
gf':= g' ;; f': pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) -->[ g · f] d
X0: pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)),,
pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR)))),, gf'
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR))))

      apply (maponpaths pr1 X0).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
c, c', c'': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
g: C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧
d: (D,, X) c
(λ e : pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
       pr1
         (iscontrpr1
            (unique_lift g
               (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))),
 pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)) =
 transportb (λ x : pr1 D c'', x -->[ g · f] d) e
   (pr2
      (iscontrpr1
         (unique_lift g
            (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))) ;; 
    pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift f d))))
  (let XR := unique_lift f d in
   let d' := pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR) in
   let f' := pr2 (iscontrpr1 XR) in
   let g' := pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift g d')) in
   let gf' := g' ;; f' in
   let X0 :=
     proofirrelevancecontr
       (let X0 := pr1 X in X0 c c'' (g · f) d)
       (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)),,
        pr2 (iscontrpr1 (unique_lift (g · f) d)))
       (pr1
          (iscontrpr1
             (unique_lift g (pr1 (iscontrpr1 XR)))),,
        gf') in
   maponpaths pr1 X0)
 apply  (disp_mor_unique_disc_fib _ (D,,X)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
X: is_discrete_fibration D
∏ c : C, isaset ((D,, X) c)
 apply isaset_fiber_discrete_fibration.
Defined.

(** Some standard cartesian cells *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_cartesian (id_disp xx)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_cartesian (id_disp xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
∃! gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
isaprop (∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
isaprop (∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros f₁ f₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; intros ; apply D | ] ;
       refine (id_right_disp_var _ @ _ @ !(id_right_disp_var _)) ;
       rewrite (pr2 f₁), (pr2 f₂) ;
       apply idpath).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
zz -->[ g] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
(λ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
zz -->[ g] xx
 exact (transportf _ (id_right _) hh).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
hh: zz -->[ g · identity x] xx
(λ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; id_disp xx = hh)
  (transportf (mor_disp zz xx) (id_right g) hh)
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         rewrite id_right_disp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite pathsinv0r ;
         apply idpath).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
is_cartesian (ff ;; gg)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
is_cartesian (ff ;; gg)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
∃! gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh')
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
∑ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh')
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros f₁ f₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff) ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hgg) ;
       rewrite !assoc_disp_var ;
       rewrite (pr2 f₁), (pr2 f₂) ;
       apply idpath).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
∑ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
ww -->[ h] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
(λ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh') ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
ww -->[ h] xx
 exact (cartesian_factorisation
               Hff
               h
               (cartesian_factorisation
                  Hgg
                  (h · f)
                  (transportf
                     (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                     (assoc _ _ _)
                     hh'))).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
hh': ww -->[ h · (f · g)] zz
(λ gg0 : ww -->[ h] xx, gg0 ;; (ff ;; gg) = hh')
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff h
     (cartesian_factorisation Hgg (h · f)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, ww -->[ z0] zz)
           (assoc h f g) hh')))
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         rewrite assoc_disp ;
         rewrite !cartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_cartesian ff


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_cartesian ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
∃! gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
isaprop (∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
isaprop (∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf)
 abstract
      (apply invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       pose (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂)) as r ;
       refine (id_right_disp_var _ @ _ @ !(id_right_disp_var _)) ;
       pose (transportf_transpose_left (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hff)) as r' ;
       rewrite <- !r' ; clear r' ;
       rewrite !mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
       rewrite !assoc_disp ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       exact r).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
∑ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
zz -->[ g] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
(λ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
zz -->[ g] xx
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
g · f · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf) = g

      abstract
        (rewrite assoc' ;
         refine (_ @ id_right _) ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
z: C
g: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
zz: D z
gf: zz -->[ g · f] yy
(λ gg : zz -->[ g] xx, gg ;; ff = gf)
  (transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧, zz -->[ z0] xx)
     (is_cartesian_z_iso_disp_subproof0 C x y f Hf z g)
     (gf ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hff))
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite assoc_disp_var ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         etrans ;
           [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             apply (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor Hff)
           | ] ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite id_right_disp ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property ;
         rewrite disp_id_right).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
∃! gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
         ff = gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
   gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
            p ff = gg)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
∑ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
         ff = gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
isaprop
  (∑ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
   gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
            p ff = gg)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff) ;
       pose (p₁ := pr2 φ₁) ;
       pose (p₂ := pr2 φ₂) ;
       cbn in p₁, p₂ ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker in p₁ ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker in p₂ ;
       pose (transportb_transpose_right p₁) as r₁ ;
       pose (transportb_transpose_right p₂) as r₂ ;
       exact (r₁ @ !r₂)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
∑ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
         ff = gg
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
cc -->[ g] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
(λ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
 gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
          ff = gg) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
cc -->[ g] xx
 exact (cartesian_factorisation
               Hff
               g
               (transportb
                  (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                  (maponpaths (λ z, g · z) p)
                  gg)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_cartesian ff
c: C
g: C ⟦ c, x ⟧
cc: D c
gg: cc -->[ g · f'] yy
(λ gg0 : cc -->[ g] xx,
 gg0 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
          ff = gg)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hff g
     (transportb (λ z : C ⟦ c, y ⟧, cc -->[ z] yy)
        (maponpaths (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, g · z) p) gg))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite cartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
is_cartesian ff

D: disp_cat C

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
is_cartesian ff

D: disp_cat C

pp: ff ;; gg =

  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
φφ: ww -->[ φ · f] yy
∃! gg : ww -->[ φ] xx, gg ;; ff = φφ

D: disp_cat C

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
