C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
φφ: ww -->[ φ · f] yy
isaprop (∑ gg : ww -->[ φ] xx, gg ;; ff = φφ)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros ψ₁ ψ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hhh) ;
       rewrite <- (transportb_transpose_left pp) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
       rewrite !assoc_disp ;
       rewrite (pr2 ψ₁), (pr2 ψ₂) ;
       apply idpath).

transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh

  hh

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
φφ: ww -->[ φ · f] yy
φ · f · g = φ · h

      abstract
        (rewrite p ;
         rewrite assoc ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
Hhh: is_cartesian hh
w: C
φ: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
ww: D w
φφ: ww -->[ φ · f] yy
(λ gg : ww -->[ φ] xx, gg ;; ff = φφ)
  (cartesian_factorisation Hhh φ
     (transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ w, z ⟧, ww -->[ z0] zz)
        (is_cartesian_precomp_subproof0 C x y z f g h
           p w φ) (φφ ;; gg)))
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hgg) ;
         rewrite assoc_disp_var ;
         rewrite pp ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite cartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
is_cartesian gg


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
is_cartesian gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
∃! gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

p: h · f = g

zz: D z

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx

Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g

D: disp_cat C

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

p: h · f = g

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg

k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
∃! gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g

    abstract
      (refine (!_) ;
       use z_iso_inv_on_right ;
       exact (!p)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g

yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx

pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg

qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
∃! gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r ff =
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
∃! gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r ff =
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg

    abstract
      (rewrite <- (transportb_transpose_left pp) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
       rewrite assoc_disp ;
       refine (!_) ;
       etrans ;
       [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         exact (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor Hhh)
       | ] ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
       rewrite id_left_disp ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply homset_property).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
∃! gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg

isaprop (∑ gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
isaprop (∑ gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply D | ] ;
       use (postcomp_with_z_iso_disp_is_inj Hh (idpath _) Hhh) ; cbn ;
       use (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hff) ;
       rewrite !assoc_disp_var ;
       rewrite pp ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite !mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
       rewrite !transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       exact (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂))).

p: h · f = g

Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg

k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
k · h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) = k
 abstract
          (rewrite assoc' ;
           etrans ; [ apply maponpaths ; apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh)) | ] ;
           apply id_right).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
k · g = k · h · f
 abstract
          (rewrite assoc' ;
           rewrite p ;
           apply idpath).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: h · f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] zz
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: yy -->[ h] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' h Hh) hh
pp: hh ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy zz) p gg
q: C
k: C ⟦ q, y ⟧
qq: D q
kg: qq -->[ k · g] zz
r: f = inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' h Hh) · g
rr: transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) r
  ff = inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; gg
(λ gg0 : qq -->[ k] yy, gg0 ;; gg = kg)
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ q, y ⟧, qq -->[ z] yy)
     (z_iso_disp_to_is_cartesian_subproof2 C x y h Hh
        q k)
     (cartesian_factorisation Hff (k · h)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ q, z ⟧, qq -->[ z0] zz)
           (z_iso_disp_to_is_cartesian_subproof3 C x y
              z f g h p q k) kg) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                      Hhh))
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
         rewrite assoc_disp_var ;
         etrans ; [ do 3 apply maponpaths ; exact (!rr) | ] ;
         rewrite transport_f_f ;
         rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
         rewrite cartesian_factorisation_commutes ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply transportf_set ;
         apply homset_property).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_opcartesian (id_disp xx)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_opcartesian (id_disp xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_cartesian (id_disp xx)

  exact (@is_cartesian_id_disp _ (op_disp_cat D) _ xx).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
z: C
zz: D z
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
Hgg: is_opcartesian gg
is_opcartesian (ff ;; gg)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
Hhh: is_opcartesian hh
is_opcartesian gg

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
Hhh: is_opcartesian hh
is_cartesian hh
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
p: h = f · g
pp: ff ;; gg =
transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz) p
  hh
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
Hhh: is_opcartesian hh
is_opcartesian hh

    exact Hhh.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_opcartesian ff


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_opcartesian ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_cartesian ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_z_isomorphism f
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f ?Hf) ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_z_isomorphism f
 exact (pr2 (@opp_z_iso C _ _ (make_z_iso' f Hf))).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' f (pr2 (opp_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf))))
  ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) ff

    exact Hff.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_cartesian ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.

(**
Cartesian factorisation of disp nat trans and functor
 *)
Section CartesianFactorisationDispNatTrans.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F₁ F₂ F₃ : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {α : F₂ ⟹ F₃}
          {β : F₁ ⟹ F₂}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          {FF₁ : disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂}
          {FF₂ : disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂}
          {FF₃ : disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂}
          (αα : disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃)
          (ββ : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ β α) FF₁ FF₃)
          (Hαα : ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)).

  Definition cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₁ FF₂
    := λ x xx, cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₁ ff ;; cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
              y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data x xx ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₁ ff ;; cartesian_factorisation (Hαα y yy) (β y)
              (ββ y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₁ ff ;; cartesian_factorisation (Hαα y yy) (β y)
              (ββ y yy) ;; αα y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα y yy)
                  (β y) (ββ y yy) ;; αα y yy)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; ββ y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f)
     (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y
          f) (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff) ;; αα y yy

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   ♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y))
     (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x)
        (ββ x xx) ;; (♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   (♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   (♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   (♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy)) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   (♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy)) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₂ ff ;; αα y yy = ?t2

      exact (disp_nat_trans_ax αα ff).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   transportb (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   transportf (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (β x))
        (! nat_trans_ax α x y f))
     (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x)
        (ββ x xx) ;; (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (assoc (β x) (α x) ((# F₃)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x)
        (ββ x xx) ;; αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (! assoc (β x) (α x) ((# F₃)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x)
        (ββ x xx) ;; αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (β x) (α x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (cartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; 
   αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (β x) (α x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
   cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
     ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y)
     (! nat_trans_ax β x y f)) (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! assoc (β x) (α x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
maponpaths (compose (β x)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
assoc (β x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (α y) @
cancel_postcomposition (β x · (# F₂)%cat f)
  ((# F₁)%cat f · β y) (α y) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f) =
! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) x y f @
assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (β y) (α y)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans β FF₁ FF₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans β FF₁ FF₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data β FF₁ FF₂
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₁ FF₂,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data β FF₁ FF₂
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₂ ⟹ F₃
β: F₁ ⟹ F₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₂ FF₃
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ β α) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_cartesian (αα x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₁ FF₂,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_axioms.
  Defined.
End CartesianFactorisationDispNatTrans.

Section CartesianFactorisationDispFunctor.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          (HD₁ : cleaving D₂)
          {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          (GG : disp_functor G D₁ D₂)
          (α : F ⟹ G).

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x)
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ (# F)%cat f] Fob y yy)
  ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x)
 exact (λ x xx, pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))).
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (F x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ (# F)%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
 exact (λ x y xx yy f ff,
             cartesian_factorisation
               (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
               _
               (transportb
                  (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                  (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)
                  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff))).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g)
  (♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data ff ;; 
   ♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data gg)

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
  ((# F)%cat (identity x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
  ((# F)%cat (identity x))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 xx))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                               (id_disp
                                                 xx)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; transportb
                                               (mor_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))
                                               (functor_id
                                                 G x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; transportf
                                               (mor_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))
                                               (! 
                                                functor_id
                                                 G x)
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG x xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; id_disp
                                               (GG x
                                                 xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG x xx)) (id_right (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG x xx)) (! id_right (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))
  (! functor_id F x)
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x))
  (id_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) ;; pr12 
   (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG x xx)) (id_left (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG x xx)) (! id_left (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG x xx)
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG x xx))
  (! id_left (α x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
! id_right (α x) @
maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x) @
! nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x) =
! id_left (α x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
  ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x)

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g)
  (♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data ff ;; 
   ♯ cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data gg)
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz)))
  ((# F)%cat (f · g))
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z0] GG z zz) (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (ff ;; hh))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (functor_comp F f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportb
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz)))
  ((# F)%cat (f · g))
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z0] GG z zz) (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (ff ;; hh))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (functor_comp F f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportb
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh))) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz)))
  ((# F)%cat (f · g))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z0] GG z zz) (! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 (ff ;; hh))) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (! functor_comp F f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh))) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))

zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧

hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz) (! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                               (ff ;; hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (! functor_comp F f g)

     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportf

                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[

                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)

                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh))) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))

HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz) (! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; transportb
                                               (mor_disp
                                                 (GG x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))
                                               (functor_comp
                                                 G f g)
                                               (♯ GG
                                                 ff ;;

                                                 hh)) =

  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (! functor_comp F f g)

     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)

         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation

                                 (GG z zz)))

                                 (GG y yy)) -->[

                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)

                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;;

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz

   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz) (! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))

                                               (!

  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))

  (! functor_comp F f g)

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz) (! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (maponpaths (compose (α x))
        (! functor_comp G f g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 ♯ GG
                                                 hh))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (! functor_comp F f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh))) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (pr1 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z) (GG z zz))))
  (! functor_comp F f g)
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh))) ;; pr12 (HD₁

                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                        (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                 (GG z zz)))
                        ((# F)%cat g)
                        (transportf
                           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                            pr1
                              (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) -->[
                            z0] GG z zz)
                           (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                           (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                    (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                            ♯ GG hh)) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
            pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
            z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
           (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
            ♯ GG ff)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                            (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z)
                                     (α z) (GG z zz)))
                            ((# F)%cat g)
                            (transportf
                               (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                                pr1
                                  (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                     (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
                                z0] GG z zz)
                               (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                               (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                        (α y)
                                        (GG y yy)) ;; 
                                ♯ GG hh)) ;; pr12 
                          (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                             (GG z zz)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                         (pr22 (HD₁ (G z) (F z) (α z)
                                  (GG z zz)))
                         ((# F)%cat g)
                         (transportf
                            (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                             pr1
                               (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                  (GG y yy)) -->[
                             z0] GG z zz)
                            (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                            (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y)
                                     (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
                             ♯ GG hh)) ;; pr12 (HD₁
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (α z)
                                                 (GG z
                                                 zz))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; transportf
                        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                         pr1
                           (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                              (GG y yy)) -->[
                         z0] GG z zz)
                        (! nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                        (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG hh))

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
        (! nat_trans_ax α y z g))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
            pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
            z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
           (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
            ♯ GG ff)) ;; (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                  (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 hh)))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; (♯ GG ff ;; 
                                              ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)) ;; (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                               (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG hh))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff ;; 
      ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
            pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
            z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
           (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
            ♯ GG ff)) ;; pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG hh))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff ;; 
      ♯ GG hh)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
            pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
            z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
           (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;;

                                 (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG hh))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂

α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff ;; 
   ♯ GG hh) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
        ((# F)%cat f)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
            pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
            z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
           (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
            ♯ GG ff)) ;; pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y)
                                 (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG hh))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
