α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff ;; 
   ♯ GG hh) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
         z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff) ;; ♯ GG hh))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff ;; 
   ♯ GG hh) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
        (GG z zz))
     (! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
           (GG z zz))
        (cancel_postcomposition (α x · (# G)%cat f)
           ((# F)%cat f · α y) ((# G)%cat g)
           (! nat_trans_ax α x y f))
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff ;; ♯ GG hh)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z0] GG z zz)
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
   ! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff ;; 
   ♯ GG hh) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG z zz))
  (cancel_postcomposition (α x · (# G)%cat f)
     ((# F)%cat f · α y) ((# G)%cat g)
     (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff ;; 
   ♯ GG hh)

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g) @
! nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g) =
cancel_postcomposition (α x · (# G)%cat f)
  ((# F)%cat f · α y) ((# G)%cat g)
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
! assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g) @
maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
  (! nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
  ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor F D₁ D₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor F D₁ D₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂,
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ FF : disp_functor_data F D₁ D₂,
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_axioms.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
is_cartesian_disp_functor
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
         z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HGff:= HGG x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_cartesian (♯ GG ff)
is_cartesian
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     ((# F)%cat f)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
         pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
         z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
        (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; 
         ♯ GG ff)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HGff:= HGG x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_cartesian (♯ GG ff)
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
  ((# F)%cat f)
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
      z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff)) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (idpath ((# F)%cat f · α x))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
      z] GG x xx) (! nat_trans_ax α y x f)
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HGG: is_cartesian_disp_functor GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
HGff:= HGG x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_cartesian (♯ GG ff)
transportb
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG ff) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
   z] GG x xx) (idpath ((# F)%cat f · α x))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) -->[
      z] GG x xx) (! nat_trans_ax α y x f)
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data α cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG
    := λ x xx, pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)).

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
  ((# F)%cat f)
  (transportb
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z] GG y yy) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff)) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG y yy)) (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
cartesian_factorisation
  (pr22 (HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)))
  ((# F)%cat f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
      pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
      z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
     (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG
                                                 ff)) ;; pr12 
(HD₁ (G y) (F y) (α y) (GG y yy)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG y yy)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
   pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) -->[
   z] GG y yy) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)))
     (GG y yy)) (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx)) ;; ♯ GG ff)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans α
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans α
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_data α
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α
         cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_data α
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α
         cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data GG,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data
 exact cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_axioms.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
is_cartesian
  (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell x xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
GG: disp_functor G D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
is_cartesian
  (cartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell x xx)

    exact (pr22 (HD₁ (G x) (F x) (α x) (GG x xx))).
  Defined.
End CartesianFactorisationDispFunctor.

(**
Cartesian factorisation of disp nat trans and functor
 *)
Section OpCartesianFactorisationDispNatTrans.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F₁ F₂ F₃ : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {α : F₁ ⟹ F₂}
          {β : F₂ ⟹ F₃}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          {FF₁ : disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂}
          {FF₂ : disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂}
          {FF₃ : disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂}
          (αα : disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂)
          (ββ : disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp _ _ _ α β) FF₁ FF₃)
          (Hαα : ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)).

  Definition opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₂ FF₃
    := λ x xx, opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x) (ββ x xx).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
              y yy =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data x xx ;; 
   ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα y yy) (β y)
              (ββ y yy) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
  (opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx) (β x)
     (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
αα x xx ;; (♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                          (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
αα x xx ;; transportb (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
             (nat_trans_ax β x y f)
             (opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
αα x xx ;; (♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                          (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
αα x xx ;; transportf (mor_disp (FF₂ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
             (! nat_trans_ax β x y f)
             (opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
αα x xx ;; (♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                          (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (αα x xx ;; (opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                 (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f))
     (αα x xx ;; opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                   (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f))
     (αα x xx ;; opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                   (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff))

F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (αα x xx ;; opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα x xx)
                (β x) (ββ x xx) ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃

D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                         (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy) =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
αα x xx ;; ♯ FF₂ ff = ?y'

      apply (disp_nat_trans_ax_var αα ff).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₂ y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy) ;; 
   opcartesian_factorisation (Hαα y yy) (β y)
     (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
        (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y)
        (nat_trans_ax α x y f))
     (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                               (Hαα y yy) (β y)
                               (ββ y yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

β: F₂ ⟹ F₃

FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; αα y yy ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                            (Hαα y yy) (β y) (ββ y yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂

  FF₃

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y

  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @

                                (Hαα y yy) (β y)
                                (ββ y yy)))) =

  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

β: F₂ ⟹ F₃

FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂

  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)

                             (ββ y yy))) =

  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; ββ y yy) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃

D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂

αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (♯ FF₁ ff ;; ββ y yy) = ?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF₁ ff ;; ββ y yy = ?t2

      exact (disp_nat_trans_ax ββ ff).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) x y f)
     (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
     (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) x y
          f) (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) x y f @
   assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF₁ x xx) (FF₃ y yy))
  (! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f))
  (ββ x xx ;; ♯ FF₃ ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! nat_trans_ax (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) x y f @
assoc ((# F₁)%cat f) (α y) (β y) @
cancel_postcomposition ((# F₁)%cat f · α y)
  (α x · (# F₂)%cat f) (β y) (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
! assoc (α x) ((# F₂)%cat f) (β y) =
! assoc (α x) (β x) ((# F₃)%cat f) @
maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! nat_trans_ax β x y f)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans β FF₂ FF₃

  
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans β FF₂ FF₃

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data β FF₂ FF₃
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₂ FF₃,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
disp_nat_trans_data β FF₂ FF₃
 exact opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF₁: disp_functor F₁ D₁ D₂
FF₂: disp_functor F₂ D₁ D₂
FF₃: disp_functor F₃ D₁ D₂
αα: disp_nat_trans α FF₁ FF₂
ββ: disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) FF₁
  FF₃
Hαα: ∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x), is_opcartesian (αα x xx)
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data β FF₂ FF₃,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_data
 exact opcartesian_factorisation_disp_nat_trans_axioms.
  Defined.
End OpCartesianFactorisationDispNatTrans.

Section OpCartesianFactorisationDispFunctor.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          (HD₁ : opcleaving D₂)
          {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          (FF : disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
          (α : F ⟹ G).

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data G D₁ D₂

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_data G D₁ D₂

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (G x)
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (G x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ (# G)%cat f] Fob y yy)
  ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (G x)
 exact (λ x xx, ob_of_opcartesian_lift _ (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))).
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, D₁ x → D₂ (G x),
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : D₁ y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy → Fob x xx -->[ (# G)%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
   ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
     (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
 exact (λ x y xx yy f ff,
             opcartesian_factorisation
               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                  _
                  (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
               _
               (transportf
                  (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _)
                  (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)
                  (♯ FF ff
                   ;;
                   mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                     _
                     (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))))).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_axioms
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor_axioms
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id G x)
  (id_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp G f g)
  (♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data ff ;; 
   ♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data gg)

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x : C₁) (xx : D₁ x),
♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id G x)
  (id_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx))
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
     (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  ((# G)%cat (identity x))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
      FF x xx -->[
      z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
     (♯ FF (id_disp xx) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                             (HD₁ (F x) (G x)
                                (FF x xx) (α x)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (functor_id G x)
  (id_disp
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                            (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                               D₂
                                               (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                            ((# G)%cat
                                               (identity
                                                 x))
                                            (transportf
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G x ⟧,
                                                FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                z] 
                                                ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x x
                                                 (identity
                                                 x))
                                               (♯ FF
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                                mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))
                                            (functor_id
                                               G x)
                                            (id_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (♯ FF (id_disp xx) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                          (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx)
                             (α x))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))
                                            (functor_id
                                               G x)
                                            (id_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                               D₂
                                               (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))
                                            (functor_id
                                               G x)
                                            (id_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportf
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))
                                            (! functor_id
                                                 G x)
                                            (id_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; id_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
     (id_right (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
     (! id_right (α x))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x xx))
     (! functor_id F x) (id_disp (FF x xx)) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x)
        (! functor_id F x))
     (id_disp (FF x xx) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                             (HD₁ (F x) (G x)
                                (FF x xx) (α x)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x)
        (! functor_id F x))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
        (id_left (α x))
        (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
        ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x)
        (! functor_id F x))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
        (! id_left (α x))
        (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (! id_left (α x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
     ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x) @
   nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x))
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
     (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))
  (! id_right (α x) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
! id_left (α x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity (F x))
  ((# F)%cat (identity x)) (α x) (! functor_id F x) @
nat_trans_ax α x x (identity x) =
! id_right (α x) @
maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_id G x)

      apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (xx : D₁ x) (yy : pr1 D₁ y)
(zz : pr1 D₁ z) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
  (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data x xx)
     (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp G f g)
  (♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data ff ;; 
   ♯ opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data gg)
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
opcartesian_factorisation
  (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
     (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  ((# G)%cat (f · g))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
      FF x xx -->[
      z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
     (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
     (♯ FF (ff ;; hh) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (functor_comp G f g)
  (opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     ((# G)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
         FF x xx -->[
         z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
        (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
        (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))) ;; 
   opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
               (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
        (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                            (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                               D₂
                                               (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                            ((# G)%cat
                                               (f · g))
                                            (transportf
                                               (λ 
                                                z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                z0] 
                                                ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))
                                               (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x z
                                                 (f
                                                 · g))
                                               (♯ FF
                                                 (ff ;; hh) ;; 
                                                mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z))))
                                            (functor_comp
                                               G f g)
                                            (opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;; 
                                             opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 g)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                 FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α y z
                                                 g)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                            (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                               D₂
                                               (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                            ((# G)%cat
                                               (f · g))
                                            (transportf
                                               (λ 
                                                z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                z0] 
                                                ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))
                                               (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x z
                                                 (f
                                                 · g))
                                               (♯ FF
                                                 (ff ;; hh) ;; 
                                                mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportf
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z))))
                                            (! functor_comp
                                                 G f g)
                                            (opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;;
