                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 g)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                 FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α y z
                                                 g)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF (ff ;; hh) ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                           (α z))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportf
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z))))
                                            (! functor_comp
                                                 G f g)
                                            (opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;; 
                                             opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 g)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                 FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α y z
                                                 g)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportb (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh) ;; 
   mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
     (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))) =
pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; transportf

                                               (ob_of_opcartesian_lift

                                                 xx)

                                                 D₂

                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z))))

                                                 G f g)

                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))

                                                 f)

                                                 ⟦

                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z]

                                                 D₂

                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;;

                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 g)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z0 :

                                                 FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0]

                                                 D₂

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
     (! functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh) ;; 
   mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
     (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; (opcartesian_factorisation
                                                (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))

                                                 f)

                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;;

                                                (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                ((# G)%cat
                                                 g)

                                                 (λ 
                                                 z0 : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 G z ⟧,
                                                 FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                 z0] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)

                                                 zz)

                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α y z

                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 hh ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (G z)
                                                 (FF z
                                                 zz)
                                                 (α z))))))

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂

α: F ⟹ G

yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))

     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
        ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z)
        (! functor_comp F f g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                              (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                 (FF z zz) (α z)))) =

  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂

  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; (opcartesian_factorisation
                                                (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))

                                                 f)

                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,

                                                 FF x

                                                 z]

                                                 D₂

                                                 z0]

                                                 D₂

                                                 zz)

                                                 (nat_trans_ax

zz: pr1 D₁ z

g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧

  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @

  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                                 (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                                 ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;; 
      opcartesian_factorisation
        (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
           (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
        ((# G)%cat g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
            FF y yy -->[
            z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                  (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
           (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
           (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                            (α z))))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g))
     (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                                 (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                                 ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;; 
      opcartesian_factorisation
        (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
           (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
        ((# G)%cat g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
            FF y yy -->[
            z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                  (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
           (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
           (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                            (α z))))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))) ;; 
   opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
               (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
        (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
      FF x xx -->[
      z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
     (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                   (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))) ;; 
   opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
               (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
        (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))))

yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
        (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
        (nat_trans_ax α x y f))
     (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                   (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) ;; 
      opcartesian_factorisation
        (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
           (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
        ((# G)%cat g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
            FF y yy -->[
            z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                  (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
           (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
           (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                            (α z))))))

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                              (α z))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) ;; 
   opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat g)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
               (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
        (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))))

D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z))
     (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                               D₂
                               (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                  (FF z zz) (α z))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                    (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) ;; 
                  opcartesian_factorisation
                    (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                       D₂
                       (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy)
                          (α y))) ((# G)%cat g)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                        FF y yy -->[
                        z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                              (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                 (FF z zz) (α z)))
                       (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                       (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                     D₂
                                     (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                        (FF z zz)
                                        (α z)))))))

  (mor_disp (FF x xx)

  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)

     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @

  (transportf

        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                               (α z)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; (mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                    (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) ;; 
                  opcartesian_factorisation
                    (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                       D₂
                       (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy)
                          (α y))) ((# G)%cat g)
                    (transportf
                       (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                        FF y yy -->[
                        z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                              (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                 (FF z zz) (α z)))
                       (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                       (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                     D₂
                                     (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                        (FF z zz)
                                        (α z)))))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                               (α z)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (♯ FF ff ;; transportf
                   (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F y, G z ⟧,
                    FF y yy -->[
                    z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                          (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                             (α z)))
                   (nat_trans_ax α y z g)
                   (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                 D₂
                                 (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                    (FF z zz) (α z)))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                               (α z)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF x xx)
        (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
     (assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF x xx)
           (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
        (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
           (nat_trans_ax α y z g))
        (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                  D₂
                                  (HD₁ (F z) (G z)
                                     (FF z zz) (α z))))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf
  (λ z0 : C₂ ⟦ F x, G z ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z0] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
         (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z)))
  (assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
     ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
   nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                               (α z)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz) (α z))))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
     (nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
   assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g) @
   cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
     (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
   ! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
   maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g))
  (♯ FF ff ;; (♯ FF hh ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                            (HD₁ (F z) (G z) (FF z zz)
                               (α z))))

      
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y, z: C₁
xx: D₁ x
yy: pr1 D₁ y
zz: pr1 D₁ z
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
hh: yy -->[ g] zz
assoc ((# F)%cat f) ((# F)%cat g) (α z) @
cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · (# F)%cat g)
  ((# F)%cat (f · g)) (α z) (! functor_comp F f g) @
nat_trans_ax α x z (f · g) =
maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
  (nat_trans_ax α y z g) @
assoc ((# F)%cat f) (α y) ((# G)%cat g) @
cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f · α y)
  (α x · (# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g)
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f) @
! assoc (α x) ((# G)%cat f) ((# G)%cat g) @
maponpaths (compose (α x)) (! functor_comp G f g)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_functor G D₁ D₂

(λ FF : disp_functor_data G D₁ D₂,
 disp_functor_axioms FF) ?pr1

α: F ⟹ G
(λ FF : disp_functor_data G D₁ D₂,
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
 exact opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_axioms.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category

HD₁: opcleaving D₂

α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
is_opcartesian_disp_functor
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
is_opcartesian
  (opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
        (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
HFff:= HFF x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff)
is_opcartesian
  (opcartesian_factorisation
     (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     ((# G)%cat f)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
         FF y yy -->[
         z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
              (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
        (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
        (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                      (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
HFff:= HFF x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff)
pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                            (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                               D₂
                                               (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                            ((# G)%cat
                                               f)
                                            (transportf
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 G x ⟧,
                                                FF y
                                                 yy -->[
                                                z] 
                                                ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α y x
                                                 f)
                                               (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   FF y yy -->[
   z] pr1 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (idpath (α y · (# G)%cat f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
      FF y yy -->[
      z] pr1 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
     (♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
HFF: is_opcartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_opcartesian ff
HFff:= HFF x y f xx yy ff Hff: is_opcartesian (♯ FF ff)
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   FF y yy -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
   FF y yy -->[
   z] pr1 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
  (idpath (α y · (# G)%cat f))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, G x ⟧,
      FF y yy -->[
      z] pr1 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)))
     (nat_trans_ax α y x f)
     (♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data
    : disp_nat_trans_data α FF opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
    := λ x xx, pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)).

α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data

  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (α x)))
                                               ((# G)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,
                                                 G y ⟧,
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))
                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y
                                                 f)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)
                                                 (α y)))))

D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂

FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (pr12 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x)) ;; opcartesian_factorisation
                                               (mor_of_opcartesian_lift_is_opcartesian
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (G x)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)

                                               ((# G)%cat

                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F x,

                                                 FF x
                                                 xx -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 ob_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (G y)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 yy)

                                                 (nat_trans_ax
                                                 α x y

                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff ;; 
                                                 mor_of_opcartesian_lift
                                                 D₂
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 (F y)

                                                 yy)

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF x xx)
     (ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))))
  (! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
      FF x xx -->[
      z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
           (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
     (nat_trans_ax α x y f)
     (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                   (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f @ ! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧,
   FF x xx -->[
   z] ob_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
        (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y)))
  (nat_trans_ax α x y f @ ! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
  (♯ FF ff ;; mor_of_opcartesian_lift D₂
                (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))) =
♯ FF ff ;; pr12 (HD₁ (F y) (G y) (FF y yy) (α y))

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaset (C₂ ⟦ F x, G y ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans α FF
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans α FF
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_data α FF
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α FF
         opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
disp_nat_trans_data α FF
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data
 exact opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data α FF
         opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_data,
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_data
 exact opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell_axioms.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
is_opcartesian
  (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell x xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: opcleaving D₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
α: F ⟹ G
x: C₁
xx: D₁ x
is_opcartesian
  (opcartesian_factorisation_disp_functor_cell x xx)

    exact (pr22 (HD₁ (F x) (G x) (FF x xx) (α x))).
  Defined.
End OpCartesianFactorisationDispFunctor.

Section fiber_functor_from_cleaving.

  Context {C : category} (D : disp_cat C) (F : cleaving D).
  Context {c c' : C} (f : C⟦c', c⟧).

  Let lift_f :  ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f := F _ _ f.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_data D[{c}] D[{c'}]

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_data D[{c}] D[{c'}]

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
D[{c}] → D[{c'}]
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
(λ F : D[{c}] → D[{c'}],
 ∏ a b : D[{c}],
 D[{c}] ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D[{c'}] ⟦ F a, F b ⟧) 
  ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
D[{c}] → D[{c'}]
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
D[{c'}]
 exact (object_of_cartesian_lift _ _ (lift_f d)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
(λ F : D[{c}] → D[{c'}],
 ∏ a b : D[{c}],
 D[{c}] ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D[{c'}] ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ d : D[{c}], lift_f d)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
D[{c'}] ⟦ lift_f d', lift_f d ⟧
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
lift_f d' -->[ identity c'] lift_f d


      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
XR':= @cartesian_factorisation C D c c' f: ∏ (d : D c) (d' : D c') 
(ff : d' -->[ f] d),
is_cartesian ff
→ ∏ (c'' : C) (g : C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧) 
  (d'' : D c''),
  d'' -->[ g · f] d → d'' -->[ g] d'
lift_f d' -->[ identity c'] lift_f d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
XR': ∏ (c'' : C) (g : C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧) 
(d'' : D c''),
d'' -->[ g · f] d → d'' -->[ g] lift_f d
lift_f d' -->[ identity c'] lift_f d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
XR': ∏ (c'' : C) (g : C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧) 
(d'' : D c''),
d'' -->[ g · f] d → d'' -->[ g] lift_f d
lift_f d' -->[ identity c' · f] d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
XR': ∏ (c'' : C) (g : C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧) 
(d'' : D c''),
d'' -->[ g · f] d → d'' -->[ g] lift_f d
lift_f d' -->[ identity c' · f] d
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d', d: D[{c}]
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
XR': ∏ (c'' : C) (g : C ⟦ c'', c' ⟧) 
(d'' : D c''),
d'' -->[ g · f] d → d'' -->[ g] lift_f d
f · identity c = identity c' · f

        etrans; [ apply id_right |]; apply pathsinv0; apply id_left.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
is_functor fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
is_functor fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_idax fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_compax fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_idax fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (lift_f d ;; id_disp d)) = id_disp (lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
id_disp (lift_f d) =
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (lift_f d ;; id_disp d))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
id_disp (lift_f d) ;; lift_f d =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d ;; id_disp d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (id_left f)
  (lift_f d) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d ;; id_disp d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d ;; id_disp d) =
transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (id_left f)
  (lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d ;; id_disp d) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
?b =
transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) 
  (id_left f) (lift_f d)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d ;; id_disp d) =
?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
lift_f d ;; id_disp d = ?t2
 apply id_right_disp. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (id_right f)
     (lift_f d)) =
transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (id_left f)
  (lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (! id_right f @ id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d) =
transportb (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (id_left f)
  (lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d)
  (! id_right f @ id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d) d) (! id_left f)
  (lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d: D[{c}]
! id_right f @ id_right f @ ! id_left f = ! id_left f

      apply homset_property.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
functor_compax fiber_functor_from_cleaving_data
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                      (id_right (identity c))
                      (ff' ;; ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') (lift_f d))
  (id_right (identity c'))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') (lift_f d))
  (id_right (identity c'))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff))) =
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                      (id_right (identity c))
                      (ff' ;; ff)))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') (lift_f d))
  (id_right (identity c'))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff))) ;; 
lift_f d =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                   (id_right (identity c)) (ff' ;; ff))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c' · identity c')
     (identity c') f (id_right (identity c')))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
   lift_f d) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                   (id_right (identity c)) (ff' ;; ff))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                   (id_right (identity c)) (ff' ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c' · identity c')
     (identity c') f (id_right (identity c')))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
   lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                   (id_right (identity c)) (ff' ;; ff)) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition 
     (identity c' · identity c') 
     (identity c') f (id_right (identity c')))
  (cartesian_factorisation 
     (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) 
        (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation 
     (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) 
        (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
   lift_f d)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; transportf (mor_disp d'' d)
                   (id_right (identity c)) (ff' ;; ff)) =
?b
 apply maponpaths; apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)))
     (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c' · identity c')
     (identity c') f (id_right (identity c')))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
   lift_f d)

f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧

d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
   id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity c' · identity c')
     (identity c') f (id_right (identity c')))
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')

        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
   lift_f d)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  ((maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
    id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition
       (identity c' · identity c') (identity c') f
       (id_right (identity c')))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff)) =
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
lift_f d

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
lift_f d =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  ((maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
    id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition
       (identity c' · identity c') (identity c') f
       (id_right (identity c')))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (assoc (identity c') (identity c') f)
  (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d') (identity c')
     (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d')
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d'' ;; ff')) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation (lift_f d) (identity c')
      (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d') d)
         (id_right f @ ! id_left f) (lift_f d' ;; ff)) ;; 
    lift_f d)) =

    id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition
       (identity c' · identity c') (identity c') f
       (id_right (identity c')))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))
