F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
lift_f d'' ;; ff' ;; ff = ?t2
 apply assoc_disp_var. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (f · identity c)
     (identity c' · f) (identity c)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (assoc f (identity c) (identity c))
     (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (((((maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
       id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity c' · identity c') (identity c') f
          (id_right (identity c'))) @
     ! assoc (identity c') (identity c') f) @
    ! maponpaths (compose (identity c'))
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   ! (! assoc (identity c') f (identity c)))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (f · identity c)
     (identity c' · f) (identity c)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (assoc f (identity c) (identity c))
     (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (((((maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
       id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity c' · identity c') 
          (identity c') f 
          (id_right (identity c'))) @
     ! assoc (identity c') (identity c') f) @
    ! maponpaths (compose (identity c'))
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   ! (! assoc (identity c') f (identity c)))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (cancel_postcomposition (f · identity c)
     (identity c' · f) (identity c)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
     (assoc f (identity c) (identity c))
     (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
F: cleaving D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c', c ⟧
lift_f:= F c c' f: ∏ d : D c, cartesian_lift d f
d'', d', d: D[{c}]
ff': D[{c}] ⟦ d'', d' ⟧
ff: D[{c}] ⟦ d', d ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (assoc f (identity c) (identity c) @
   cancel_postcomposition (f · identity c)
     (identity c' · f) (identity c)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (lift_f d'') d)
  (((((maponpaths (compose f) (id_right (identity c)) @
       id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity c' · identity c') (identity c') f
          (id_right (identity c'))) @
     ! assoc (identity c') (identity c') f) @
    ! maponpaths (compose (identity c'))
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   ! (! assoc (identity c') f (identity c)))
  (lift_f d'' ;; (ff' ;; ff))

      apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
  Qed.

  Definition fiber_functor_from_cleaving : D [{c}] ⟶ D [{c'}]
    := make_functor _  is_functor_from_cleaving_data.

End fiber_functor_from_cleaving.

Section Essential_Surjectivity.

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
∏ yy : D'[{F x}],
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
∏ yy : D'[{F x}],
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
XR:= X x yy: ∑ (y : C) (i : z_iso y x) (yy0 : D y),
z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF y yy0) yy
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
YY:= Y c'' x i xx': ∑ d' : D x, z_iso_disp i xx' d'
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
∑ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

D[{x}]
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
(λ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy) ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C

pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
D[{x}]
 apply dd.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
(λ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy) dd

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
(λ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy) dd

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
(λ xx : D[{x}], z_iso (fiber_functor FF x xx) yy) dd

      (* now need composition of iso_disps *)
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (fiber_functor FF x dd) yy

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (fiber_functor FF x dd) yy

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
XH:= ?Goal: z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (fiber_functor FF x dd) yy

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C

yy: D'[{F x}]

i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
(# F)%cat (inv_from_z_iso i) · (# F)%cat i =
identity (F x)

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C

(FF c'' xx')

(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
(# F)%cat (inv_from_z_iso i) · (# F)%cat i = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
?b = identity (F x)

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
(# F)%cat (inv_from_z_iso i) · (# F)%cat i = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
(# F)%cat (inv_from_z_iso i · i) = identity (F x)

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]

xx': D c''

dd: D x

  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')

(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
inv_from_z_iso i · i = identity x

        apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]
c'': C
i: z_iso c'' x
xx': D c''
ii: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx') yy
dd: D x
pe: z_iso_disp i xx' dd
XR:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF pe: z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F i) (FF c'' xx')
  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')
XRt:= z_iso_disp_comp XR' ii: z_iso_disp
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
XH:= z_iso_eq
  (z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (! functor_comp F (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   functor_id_id C C' F x (inv_from_z_iso i · i)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)
   :
   z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)): z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (fiber_functor FF x dd) yy

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'
FF: disp_functor F D D'
H: disp_functor_ff FF
X: disp_functor_ess_split_surj FF
Y: is_op_isofibration D
x: C
yy: D'[{F x}]

xx': D c''

dd: D x

  (FF x dd)

(FF c'' xx')

(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
XH:= z_iso_eq
  (z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (! functor_comp F (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   functor_id_id C C' F x (inv_from_z_iso i · i)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)
   :
   z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)): z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
XRT:= transportf
  (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x),
   z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy) XH: (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x), z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy)
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i))
→ (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x), z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy) (identity_z_iso (F x))
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (fiber_functor FF x dd) yy

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
F: C ⟶ C'

H: disp_functor_ff FF

  (FF x dd)
XR':= z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp XR: z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd)
(FF c'' xx')

(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy
XH:= z_iso_eq
  (z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (identity_z_iso (F x))
  (! functor_comp F (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   functor_id_id C C' F x (inv_from_z_iso i · i)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i)
   :
   z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)): z_iso_comp
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
  (functor_on_z_iso F i) = identity_z_iso (F x)
XRT:= transportf
  (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x),
   z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy) XH: (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x), z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy)
(z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
(functor_on_z_iso F i))
→ (λ r : z_iso (F x) (F x), z_iso_disp r (FF x dd) yy) (identity_z_iso (F x))
z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_comp
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F i))
     (functor_on_z_iso F i)) (FF x dd) yy

      assumption.
  Defined.

End Essential_Surjectivity.

(**
 A sufficient condition for when a cartesian factorization is an isomorphism
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
is_z_iso_disp fiso (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
is_z_iso_disp fiso (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso fiso] ww
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
?pr1 ;; cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh =
       transportb (mor_disp xx xx) 
         (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx),
 cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; 
 ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp ww ww) (pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww))
  ?pr10

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso fiso] ww
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) =
inv_from_z_iso fiso

    abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite !assoc ;
       refine (_ @ id_left _) ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso giso)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C w
     x y f Hf g Hg)
  (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           Hgg f hh =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
  (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C w
     x y f Hf g Hg)
  (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           Hgg f hh ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                          Hgg f hh) ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso)
     (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                              Hgg f hh))) ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g
         · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
            · fiso))
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
         · fiso) g
        (assoc g
           (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
           fiso))
     (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                              Hgg f hh) ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y

Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy

transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g
         · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
            · fiso))
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
         · fiso) g
        (assoc g
           (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
           fiso))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
        (assoc g
           (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
            · fiso) g)
        (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh ;; gg)))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           Hgg f hh ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (gg ;; transportf (mor_disp yy yy)
           (assoc
              (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
              fiso g)
           (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                              Hgg f hh ;; gg))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose g)
        (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
           fiso g))
     (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                               Hgg f
                                               hh ;; gg)))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

D: disp_cat C

fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x

ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso g) @

   cancel_postcomposition

     g

     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))

transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (! pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso g) @
   assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right g) gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g (! pr2 fiso))
  (id_disp xx ;; gg)

D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x

giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso g) @
   assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @

     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso

           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right g) gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g (! pr2 fiso))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left g) gg)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso g) @
   assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
