     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right g) gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g (! pr2 fiso))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_left g) gg)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_right g @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso g) @
   assoc g
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g
      · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     g
     (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        fiso) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
        (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg))) gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_left g @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g (! pr2 fiso)) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
! id_right g @
maponpaths (compose g)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) @
maponpaths (compose g)
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso
     g) @
assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
  g @
cancel_postcomposition
  (g · (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso))
  (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso) g
  (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     fiso) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
  (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg)) =
! id_left g @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
  (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g (! pr2 fiso)

    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
(λ _ : transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
         (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
            C w x y f Hf g Hg)
         (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh =
       transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso)
         (id_disp xx),
 cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; transportf
                                       (λ z : C ⟦ x, w
                                              ⟧,
                                        xx -->[ z] ww)
                                       (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                          C w x y f Hf
                                          g Hg)
                                       (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                Hhh) =
 transportb (mor_disp ww ww) (pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww))
  (cartesian_factorisation_unique Hgg
     (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, w ⟧, xx -->[ z] ww)
        (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
           C w x y f Hf g Hg)
        (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh)
     (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso)
        (id_disp xx))
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso] xx)
        (transportf (mor_disp xx ww)
           (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
              C w x y f Hf g Hg)
           (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) ;; 
         cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh)
        (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (g
               · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
              (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
              (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                 C w x y f Hf g Hg))
           (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh))
        (λ m : xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso] xx,
         m ;; gg =
         transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso)
           (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (xx -->[
            g · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
            · fiso] xx)
           (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh)
           (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
              (assoc g
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
              (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; 
                      cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh)))
           (λ m : xx -->[
                  g
                  · inv_from_z_iso
                      (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso] xx,
            transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (g
                  · inv_from_z_iso
                      (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
                 (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                    C w x y f Hf g Hg)) m ;; gg =
            transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso)
              (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (xx -->[
               inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso · g] yy)
              (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (g
                     · inv_from_z_iso
                         (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                    (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
                    (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                       C w x y f Hf g Hg))
                 (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
                    (assoc g
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh))) ;; gg)
              (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (g
                     · inv_from_z_iso
                         (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso)
                    (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
                    (cancel_postcomposition
                       (g
                        · inv_from_z_iso
                            (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                       (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
                       (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                          C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
                 (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
                    (assoc g
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh)) ;; gg))
              (λ m : xx -->[
                     inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso · g] yy,
               m =
               transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 fiso)
                 (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (xx -->[
                  g
                  · inv_from_z_iso
                      (z_iso_comp fiso giso) · fiso
                  · g] yy)
                 (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
                    (assoc g
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh)) ;; gg)
                 (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                    (cancel_postcomposition
                       (g
                        · (inv_from_z_iso
                             (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                           · fiso))
                       (g
                        · inv_from_z_iso
                            (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                        · fiso) g
                       (assoc g
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                          fiso))
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh) ;; gg))
                 (λ m : xx -->[
                        g
                        · inv_from_z_iso
                            (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                        · fiso · g] yy,
                  transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                    (cancel_postcomposition
                       (g
                        · inv_from_z_iso
                            (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                        · fiso)
                       (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso) g
                       (cancel_postcomposition
                          (g
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                          (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
                          (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                             C w x y f Hf g Hg))) m =
                  transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
                    (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (xx -->[
                     g
                     · (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                        · fiso) · g] yy)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh) ;; gg)
                    (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                       (assoc g
                          (inv_from_z_iso
                             (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                           · fiso) g)
                       (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                 Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                          Hgg f hh ;; gg)))
                    (λ m : xx -->[
                           g
                           · (inv_from_z_iso
                                (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                              · fiso) · g] yy,
                     transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                       (cancel_postcomposition
                          (g
                           · inv_from_z_iso
                               (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                           · fiso)
                          (inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso)
                          g
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso))
                             (inv_from_z_iso fiso)
                             fiso
                             (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
                       (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · (inv_from_z_iso (...)
                                 · fiso))
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso) g
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso)) fiso)) m) =
                     transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
                       (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (xx -->[
                        inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso · g] yy)
                       (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso)
                             (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                              · fiso) g
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (z_iso_comp fiso
                                        giso))
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso)
                                fiso
                                (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                   C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
                          (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...) · fiso))
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (z_iso_comp fiso
                                        giso) · fiso)
                                g
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (z_iso_comp fiso
                                         giso)) fiso))
                             (transportf
                                (mor_disp xx yy)
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...) · fiso) g)
                                (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh ;; gg)))))
                       (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso))
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso) g
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso)) fiso) @
                           cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso)
                             (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                              · fiso) g
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (z_iso_comp fiso
                                        giso))
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso)
                                fiso
                                (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                   C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
                          (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso) g)
                             (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hgg f
                                                hh ;; gg))))
                       (λ m : xx -->[
                              inv_from_z_iso fiso
                              · fiso · g] yy,
                        m =
                        transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
                          (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (xx -->[
                           inv_from_z_iso fiso · fiso
                           · g] yy)
                          (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · (inv_from_z_iso ...
                                    · fiso))
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (...) · fiso) g
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...)) fiso) @
                              cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (...) · fiso)
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                                 · fiso) g
                                (cancel_postcomposition
                                   (g
                                    · inv_from_z_iso
                                        ...)
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      fiso) fiso
                                   (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                      C w x y f Hf g
                                      Hg)))
                             (transportf
                                (mor_disp xx yy)
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...) · fiso) g)
                                (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                          Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 Hgg f
                                                 hh ;; gg))))
                          (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso) g @
                              cancel_postcomposition
                                (g · (... · fiso))
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso ...
                                 · fiso) g
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso ...)
                                   fiso) @
                              cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso ...
                                 · fiso)
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                                 · fiso) g
                                (cancel_postcomposition
                                   (g · ...)
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      fiso) fiso
                                   (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                      C w x y f Hf g
                                      Hg)))
                             (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hgg f
                                                hh ;; gg)))
                          (λ m : xx -->[
                                 inv_from_z_iso fiso
                                 · fiso · g] yy,
                           m =
                           transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
                             (pr2 fiso) (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                          (internal_paths_rew_r
                             (yy -->[
                              inv_from_z_iso
                                (z_iso_comp fiso giso)
                              · fiso · g] yy)
                             (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                         Hgg f hh ;; gg)
                             (transportf
                                (mor_disp yy yy)
                                (assoc
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (z_iso_comp fiso
                                         giso)) fiso g)
                                (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   Hhh ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                             Hgg f hh ;; gg)))
                             (λ m : yy -->[
                                    inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...) · fiso · g] yy,
                              transportf
                                (mor_disp xx yy)
                                (assoc g (...) g @
                                 cancel_postcomposition
                                   ... ... g ... @
                                 cancel_postcomposition
                                   ... ... g ...)
                                (gg ;; m) =
                              transportb
                                (mor_disp xx xx)
                                (pr2 fiso)
                                (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                             (internal_paths_rew_r
                                (xx -->[
                                 g · (... · fiso · g)] yy)
                                (gg ;; transportf
                                         (mor_disp yy
                                            yy)
                                         (assoc
                                            (inv_from_z_iso
                                               ...)
                                            fiso g)
                                         (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                            Hhh ;; 
                                          (cartesian_factorisation
                                             Hgg f hh ;; gg)))
                                (transportf
                                   (mor_disp xx yy)
                                   (maponpaths
                                      (compose g)
                                      (assoc ... fiso
                                         g))
                                   (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                             Hhh ;; 
                                           (cartesian_factorisation
                                              Hgg f hh ;; gg))))
                                (λ m : xx -->[
                                       g · (...)] yy,
                                 transportf
                                   (mor_disp xx yy)
                                   (... @ ...) m =
                                 transportb
                                   (mor_disp xx xx)
                                   (pr2 fiso)
                                   (id_disp xx) ;; gg)
                                (internal_paths_rew_r
                                   (xx -->[
                                    ... · fiso · g] yy)
                                   (transportf
                                      (mor_disp xx yy)
                                      (... @ ...)
                                      (transportf ...
                                         ... ...))
                                   (transportf
                                      (mor_disp xx yy)
                                      (... @ ...)
                                      (gg ;; (... ;; ...)))
                                   (λ m : xx -->[
                                          ...] yy,
                                    m =
                                    transportb ... ...
                                      ... ;; gg)
                                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                                      (ww -->[ ...] yy)
                                      (cartesian_factorisation
                                         Hgg f hh ;; gg)
                                      hh (λ ..., ...)
                                      (... @ ...)
                                      (cartesian_factorisation_commutes
                                         Hgg f hh))
                                   (transport_f_f
                                      (mor_disp xx yy)
                                      (maponpaths ...
                                         ...)
                                      (... @ ...)
                                      (gg ;; (... ;; ...))))
                                (mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker
                                   (assoc
                                      (inv_from_z_iso
                                         ...) fiso g)
                                   gg
                                   (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                      Hhh ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hgg f
                                                hh ;; gg))))
                             (assoc_disp_var
                                (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   Hhh)
                                (cartesian_factorisation
                                   Hgg f hh) gg))
                          (transport_f_f
                             (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso) g)
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · (inv_from_z_iso ...
                                    · fiso))
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (...) · fiso) g
                                (assoc g
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      (...)) fiso) @
                              cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (...) · fiso)
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                                 · fiso) g
                                (cancel_postcomposition
                                   (g
                                    · inv_from_z_iso
                                        ...)
                                   (inv_from_z_iso
                                      fiso) fiso
                                   (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                      C w x y f Hf g
                                      Hg)))
                             (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hgg f
                                                hh ;; gg))))
                       (transport_f_f (mor_disp xx yy)
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso))
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso) g
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso)) fiso))
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (g
                              · inv_from_z_iso
                                  (z_iso_comp fiso
                                     giso) · fiso)
                             (inv_from_z_iso fiso
                              · fiso) g
                             (cancel_postcomposition
                                (g
                                 · inv_from_z_iso
                                     (z_iso_comp fiso
                                        giso))
                                (inv_from_z_iso fiso)
                                fiso
                                (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                   C w x y f Hf g Hg)))
                          (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
                             (assoc g
                                (inv_from_z_iso
                                   (z_iso_comp fiso
                                      giso) · fiso) g)
                             (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                Hgg f
                                                hh ;; gg)))))
                    (assoc_disp_var gg
                       (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh ;; 
                        cartesian_factorisation Hgg f
                          hh) gg))
                 (mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker
                    (assoc g
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh)) gg))
              (mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker
                 (cancel_postcomposition
                    (g
                     · inv_from_z_iso
                         (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
                    (inv_from_z_iso fiso) fiso
                    (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                       C w x y f Hf g Hg))
                 (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
                    (assoc g
                       (inv_from_z_iso
                          (z_iso_comp fiso giso)) fiso)
                    (gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                              Hhh ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                       Hgg f hh))) gg))
           (assoc_disp_var gg
              (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)
              (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh)))
        (mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker
           (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
              C w x y f Hf g Hg)
           (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)
           (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh))))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; transportf
                                      (λ z : C ⟦ x, w
                                             ⟧,
                                       xx -->[ z] ww)
                                      (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof
                                         C w x y f Hf
                                         g Hg)
                                      (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               Hhh) =
transportb (mor_disp ww ww) (pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; (gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                Hhh)) =
transportb (mor_disp ww ww) (pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (transportb (mor_disp ww ww)
     (assoc f g
        (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso))
     (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 Hhh)) =
transportb (mor_disp ww ww) (pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
     (! assoc f g
          (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso))
     (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                                 Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (! assoc f g
       (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (cartesian_factorisation Hgg f hh ;; gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               Hhh) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (! assoc f g
       (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (! assoc f g
       (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (transportb (mor_disp ww ww)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     (id_disp ww)) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (! assoc f g
       (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg))
  (transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso))
     (id_disp ww)) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
transportf (mor_disp ww ww)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) @
   ! assoc f g
       (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C
        w x y f Hf g Hg)) (id_disp ww) =
transportf (mor_disp ww ww) (! pr1 fiso) (id_disp ww)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
fiso:= f,, Hf: z_iso w x
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
giso:= g,, Hg: z_iso x y
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
Hgg: is_cartesian gg
hh: ww -->[ f · g] yy
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp fiso giso) hh
! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (z_iso_comp fiso giso) @
! assoc f g
    (inv_from_z_iso giso · inv_from_z_iso fiso) @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (is_z_iso_disp_cartesian_factorisation_subproof C w
     x y f Hf g Hg) = ! pr1 fiso

    apply homset_property.
Defined.

(**
 The fiber functor of the identity
 *)
Section FiberFunctorCleavingIdenttiy.
  Context {C : category}
          {D : disp_cat C}
          (HD : cleaving D)
          (x : C).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
nat_trans_data (functor_identity D[{x}])
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
nat_trans_data (functor_identity D[{x}])
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D[{x}]
D[{x}] ⟦ functor_identity D[{x}] xx,
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x) xx ⟧

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D[{x}]
identity x · identity x = identity x

    abstract (exact (id_left _)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
is_nat_trans (functor_identity D[{x}])
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
is_nat_trans (functor_identity D[{x}])
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (f ;; fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data yy) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data xx ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (f ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD x x (identity x) yy) (identity x)
          (transportb
             (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
              z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
             fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
             (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy)))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (f ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD x x (identity x) yy) (identity x)
          (transportb
             (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
              z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
             fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
             (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy)))) ;; 
HD x x (identity x) yy =
transportf (mor_disp xx (HD x x (identity x) yy))
  (id_right (identity x))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f))) ;; HD x x
                                             (identity
                                                x) yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (f ;; cartesian_factorisation
          (HD x x (identity x) yy) (identity x)
          (transportb
             (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
              z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
             fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
             (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) ;; 
   HD x x (identity x) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x))
     (f ;; (cartesian_factorisation
              (HD x x (identity x) yy) (identity x)
              (transportb
                 (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                  functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
                  z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
                 fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
                 (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) ;; 
            HD x x (identity x) yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (f ;; (cartesian_factorisation
           (HD x x (identity x) yy) (identity x)
           (transportb
              (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
               z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
              fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
              (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) ;; 
         HD x x (identity x) yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (f ;; transportb
          (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
           z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
          fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
          (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportb
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (f ;; transportf
          (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           functor_identity D[{x}] yy -->[
           z] functor_identity D[{x}] yy)
          (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
          (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof))
     (f ;; id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (f ;; id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
     (id_right (identity x)) f) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
     (! id_right (identity x)) f) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx (functor_identity D[{x}] yy))
  (! id_right (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  f =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) xx)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
         z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof)
        (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x x (identity x) yy)
     (identity x)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD x x (identity x) xx) yy)
        (id_right (identity x) @
         ! id_left (identity x))
        (HD x x (identity x) xx ;; f)) ;; HD x x
                                            (identity
                                               x) yy)

D: disp_cat C

  (! id_right (identity x) @

     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @

     (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)))
  f =
transportf (mor_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx) yy)
  (! id_left (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
   ! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity x))
     (id_right (identity x) @ ! id_left (identity x)) @

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx, yy: D[{x}]
f: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
! id_right (identity x) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
  (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x)) =
! id_left (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
  (identity x · identity x) (identity x)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof) @
! assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
maponpaths (compose (identity x))
  (id_right (identity x) @ ! id_left (identity x)) @
assoc (identity x) (identity x) (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity x · identity x)
  (identity x) (identity x) (id_right (identity x))

    apply homset_property.
  Defined.

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
functor_identity D[{x}]
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x)

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
functor_identity D[{x}]
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x)

  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (identity x))

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_iso_disp
  (z_iso_comp (identity x,, identity_is_z_iso x)
     (identity x,, ?Hg))
  (transportb
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      functor_identity D[{x}] xx -->[
      z] functor_identity D[{x}] xx)
     fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
     (id_disp (functor_identity D[{x}] xx)))
