xx: D[{x}]
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (id_disp xx)

    apply id_is_z_iso_disp.
  Defined.
End FiberFunctorCleavingIdenttiy.

Arguments fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data {C D} HD x /.

(**
 The fiber functor of a compositio
 *)
Section FiberFunctorCleavingComp.
  Context {C : category}
          {D : disp_cat C}
          (HD : cleaving D)
          {x y z : C}
          (f : y --> x)
          (g : z --> y).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
D[{z}]
⟦ (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx,
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx ⟧

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
identity z · (g · f) = g · f

    abstract
      (exact (id_left _)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data xx ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (HD x
                                                 z
                                                 (g
                                                 · f)
                                                 yy)
                                                 (identity
                                                 z)
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (HD x
                                                 z
                                                 (g
                                                 · f)
                                                 xx)
                                                 yy)
                                                 (id_right
                                                 (g
                                                 · f) @
                                                 ! 
                                                 id_left
                                                 (g
                                                 · f))
                                                 (HD x
                                                 z
                                                 (g
                                                 · f)
                                                 xx ;; gg)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy))) ;; 
HD x z (g · f) yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) yy)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg))) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                         yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) ;; 
   HD x z (g · f) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f))
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
              (HD x y f yy))
           (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                        (HD x y f yy)
                                        (identity y)
                                        (transportf
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (HD x y
                                                 f xx)
                                              yy)
                                           (id_right f @
                                            ! id_left
                                                f)
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
      (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
         (identity z)
         (transportb
            (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
             HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
            fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
            (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) ;; 
       HD x z (g · f) yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
      (identity z)
      (transportb
         (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
          HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
         fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
         (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) ;; 
    HD x z (g · f) yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   transportb
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
      HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
     fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
     (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
      HD y z g (HD x y f yy) -->[ z0] yy)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
     (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof))
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
              (HD x y f yy))
           (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                        (HD x y f yy)
                                        (identity y)
                                        (transportf
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (HD x y
                                                 f xx)
                                              yy)
                                           (id_right f @
                                            ! id_left
                                                f)
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
      (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy))) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
           (HD x y f yy)) (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                     (HD x y f yy)
                                     (identity y)
                                     (transportf
                                        (mor_disp
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx) yy)
                                        (id_right f @
                                         ! id_left f)
                                        (HD x y f xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
   (HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (assoc (identity z) g f)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
              (HD x y f yy))
           (id_right g @ ! id_left g)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                        (HD x y f yy)
                                        (identity y)
                                        (transportf
                                           (mor_disp
                                              (HD x y
                                                 f xx)
                                              yy)
                                           (id_right f @
                                            ! id_left
                                                f)
                                           (HD x y f
                                              xx ;; gg)))) ;; 
      HD y z g (HD x y f yy) ;; HD x y f yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
        (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                        yy)

  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (! assoc (identity z) g f)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f yy))
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
              (HD x y f yy))
           (id_right g @ ! id_left g)

                                              (HD x y

                                              yy)

                                                f)
                                           (HD x y f

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
     (identity z)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))

                                        yy)

     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) yy)
      (identity z)
      (transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
         (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
         (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) ;; HD x z (g · f)
                                         yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   transportf (mor_disp (HD x z (g · f) xx) yy)
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f))
     (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg))

  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @

  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
        (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)))
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
           (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
      (HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)))

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]

  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x))
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)

           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,

           (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)

  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))

HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x))

            HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
           (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
      HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg)) =

  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   HD x z (g · f) xx ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
      HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
     (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx) ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (g · f)
        (identity z · (g · f)) (identity x)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof))
     (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (g · f)
     (identity z · (g · f)) (identity x)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   ! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx ;; gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (g · f)
     (identity z · (g · f)) (identity x)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   ! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
     (assoc g f (identity x))
     (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (assoc g f (identity x) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · f)
     (identity z · (g · f)) (identity x)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   ! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) yy)
  (maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
   assoc g (identity y) f @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
     (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; (HD x y f xx ;; gg))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx, yy: D[{x}]
gg: D[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
assoc g f (identity x) @
cancel_postcomposition (g · f) (identity z · (g · f))
  (identity x)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
! assoc (identity z) (g · f) (identity x) @
maponpaths (compose (identity z))
  (id_right (g · f) @ ! id_left (g · f)) @
assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
  (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)) =
maponpaths (compose g) (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
assoc g (identity y) f @
cancel_postcomposition (g · identity y)
  (identity z · g) f (id_right g @ ! id_left g) @
! assoc (identity z) g f @
maponpaths (compose (identity z))
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
  (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f)) ?t

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))
 exact fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data
 exact fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_laws.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
D[{z}] ⟦ pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx),
pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ⟧

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
D[{z}] ⟦ pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx),
pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ⟧

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
g · f = identity z · g · f

    abstract
      (rewrite !assoc' ;
       rewrite id_left ;
       apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))))
  (id_right (identity z))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data xx ;; fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv
                                                 xx) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))))
  (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportb
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx)))) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))

D: disp_cat C

transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))))
  (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx)))) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧

transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (pr1 (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))))
  (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx)))) ;; HD y z g
                                       (HD x y f xx) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) (HD x y f xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) g (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
     (identity z)
     (transportf
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
         HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
        (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx)) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) (HD x y f xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) g (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) (HD x y f xx))
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) g)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
           (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
      (cartesian_factorisation
         (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) (identity z)
         (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
            (identity z · g)
            (transportf
               (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
                HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
               fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
               (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; HD y z g
                                          (HD x y f xx)))) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx)

   cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)

        (HD x z (g · f) xx)) ;; HD x y f xx) =

                                      (HD x y f xx) ;;

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) xx)
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z · g) f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity z · (identity z · g)) (identity z · g)
     f
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) g @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
        (identity z) g (id_right (identity z))))
  (transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) xx)
     (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x z (g · f) xx)
        (identity z)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
           (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
           (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)) ;; 
      HD x z (g · f) xx)) =
id_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx) ;; 
HD x y f xx

transportf

   HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)

   maponpaths (compose (identity z))

     (identity z · (identity z · g)) (identity z · g)
     f

   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z · g) f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity z · (identity z · g)) (identity z · g)
     f
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) g @

        (identity z) g (id_right (identity z))))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) (HD x y f xx))
  (! id_left g) (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) ;; HD x y f
                                              xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
   HD y z g (HD x y f xx) -->[ z0] xx)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z · g) f @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity z · (identity z · g)) (identity z · g)
     f
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) g @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
        (identity z) g (id_right (identity z))))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (HD y z g (HD x y f xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition g (identity z · g) f
     (! id_left g))
  (HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ;; HD x y f xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof @
maponpaths (compose (identity z))
  fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
assoc (identity z) (identity z · g) f @
cancel_postcomposition (identity z · (identity z · g))
  (identity z · g) f
  (assoc (identity z) (identity z) g @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) g (id_right (identity z))) =
cancel_postcomposition g (identity z · g) f
  (! id_left g)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx =
identity (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx =
identity (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) xx)) (id_right (identity z))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx ;; fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data
                                                xx) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))
     (HD x z (g · f) xx)) (id_right (identity z))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD x z (g · f)
                                         xx)
                                      (identity z)
                                      (transportb
                                         (λ z0 : C
                                                 ⟦ z,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                          HD y z g
                                            (HD x y f
                                               xx) -->[
                                          z0] xx)
                                         fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
                                         (HD y z g
                                            (HD x y f
                                               xx) ;; 
                                          HD x y f xx))) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx))

HD x z (g · f) xx =

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                      (HD x z (g · f)
                                         xx)
                                      (identity z)

                                                 ⟦ z,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                          HD y z g

   HD x z (g · f) xx) =

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
     (assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f))
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
        (identity z)
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
           (identity z · g)
           (transportf
              (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
               HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
              fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
              (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                          (HD x z
                                             (g · f)
                                             xx)
                                          (identity z)
                                          (transportf
                                             (λ z0 : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ z,
                                                 x ⟧,
                                              HD y z g
                                                (HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx) -->[
                                              z0] xx)
                                             (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof)
                                             (HD y z g
                                                (HD x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx) ;; 
                                              HD x y f
                                                xx)) ;; 
                                        HD x z (g · f)
                                          xx))) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) ;; HD x z (g · f) xx

   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportb (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
     (assoc (identity z) g f)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
        (identity z)
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
           (identity z · g)
           (transportf
              (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
               HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
              fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
              (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; HD y z g
                                         (HD x y f xx) ;; 
      HD x y f xx)) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) ;; HD x z (g · f) xx

   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
     (! assoc (identity z) g f)

   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD y z g (HD x y f xx))
     (identity z)
     (cartesian_factorisation (HD x y f xx)
        (identity z · g)
        (transportf
           (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
            HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
           fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
           (HD x z (g · f) xx))) ;; HD y z g
                                      (HD x y f xx) ;; 
   HD x y f xx) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) ;; HD x z (g · f) xx

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧

  (! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (transportf
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧, HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
     fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof
