C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧, HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD x z (g · f) xx) =
id_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) ;; HD x z (g · f) xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧, HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD x z (g · f) xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
  (id_left (g · f)) (HD x z (g · f) xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
transportf
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧, HD x z (g · f) xx -->[ z0] xx)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
   ! assoc (identity z) g f @
   maponpaths (compose (identity z))
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
   assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
     (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)))
  (HD x z (g · f) xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 (HD x z (g · f) xx)) xx)
  (! id_left (g · f)) (HD x z (g · f) xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D x
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_subproof @
! assoc (identity z) g f @
maponpaths (compose (identity z))
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof) @
assoc (identity z) (identity z) (g · f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity z · identity z)
  (identity z) (g · f) (id_right (identity z)) =
! id_left (g · f)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
D[{z}] ⟦ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx,
(fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
 ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx) ?g

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
D[{z}] ⟦ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx,
(fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
 ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx ⟧
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
D[{z}] ⟦ HD x z (g · f) xx, HD y z g (HD x y f xx) ⟧

      exact (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx
   :
   D[{z}]
   ⟦ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx,
   (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx ⟧)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx =
identity (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) xx)
 exact (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_left xx).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv xx
· fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp xx =
identity (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f) xx)
 exact (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_inv_right xx).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_z_iso
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
nat_z_iso
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD (g · f)
 exact fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp
 apply is_nat_z_iso_fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp.
  Defined.
End FiberFunctorCleavingComp.

Arguments fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data {C D} HD {x y z} f g /.

(**
 The fiber functor of a cartesian functor is natural
 *)
Section FiberFunctorNatural.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          {D₁ : disp_cat C₁}
          {D₂ : disp_cat C₂}
          (HD₁ : cleaving D₁)
          (HD₂ : cleaving D₂)
          (FF : cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂)
          {x y : C₁}
          (f : y --> x).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
D₂[{F y}]
⟦ (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
    xx,
(fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
 ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx ⟧

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
(# F)%cat f = identity (F y) · (# F)%cat f

    abstract
      (exact (!(id_left _))).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) fiber_functor_natural_data

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) fiber_functor_natural_data

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
(# (fiber_functor FF x
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ (# F f)))%cat
  ff · fiber_functor_natural_data yy =
fiber_functor_natural_data xx
· (# (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
      ∙ fiber_functor FF y))%cat ff

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy)))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                             (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                FF
                                                (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 yy))
                                             (identity
                                                (F y))
                                             (transportf
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 yy)
                                                fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy)))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy)))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                             (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                FF
                                                (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 yy))
                                             (identity
                                                (F y))
                                             (transportf
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 yy)
                                                fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy)))) ;; 
♯ FF (HD₁ x y f yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy)))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))))) ;; ♯ FF
                                            (HD₁ x y f
                                               yy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                             (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                FF
                                                (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 yy))
                                             (identity
                                                (F y))
                                             (transportf
                                                (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 yy)
                                                fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))) ;; 
   ♯ FF (HD₁ x y f yy)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
        (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp
              (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
              (FF x yy))
           (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
            ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
            transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
              (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                                 (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                 FF
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 x y f
                                                 yy))
                                                 (identity
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 yy)
                                                 fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                                               ♯ FF
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 x y f
                                                 yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                              (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                 FF
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 x y f
                                                 yy))
                                              (identity
                                                 (F y))
                                              (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 yy)
                                                 fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))) ;; 
                                            ♯ FF
                                              (HD₁ x y
                                                 f yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; transportf
                                             (λ z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                              HD₂
                                                (F x)
                                                (F y)
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                (FF x
                                                 yy) -->[
                                              z] FF x
                                                 yy)
                                             fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                             (HD₂
                                                (F x)
                                                (F y)
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                (FF x
                                                 yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof)
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
        (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp
              (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
              (FF x yy))
           (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
            ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
            transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
              (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; HD₂
                                                (F x)
                                                (F y)
                                                ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                (FF x
                                                 yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: cleaving D₂

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x yy))
     (identity (F y))

        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @
         ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF x yy))
           (functor_id F x) (♯ FF ff))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                             (F y)
                                             ((# F)%cat
                                                f)
                                             (FF x yy)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))

        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)

   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

D₂: disp_cat C₂

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @

     ((# F)%cat f) @

     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))

        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f))

                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))
                                                 (functor_id
                                                 F x)
                                                 (♯ FF
                                                 ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))

     (id_right (identity (F y))))

     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))

        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,

         z] FF x xx)

   transportf

     (♯ FF

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  ((id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; transportf
                                                (mor_disp
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))
                                                (functor_id
                                                 F x)
                                                (♯ FF
                                                 ff)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
        (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
     (♯ FF

           (identity y)

              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy))

              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                           (HD₁ x y f
                                              yy)) =

  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

  ((id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @

     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))

     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))

                                                 ff))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂

HD₂: cleaving D₂

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))

        ((# F)%cat f))

        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      (transportf
         (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
            (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
         (♯ FF
            (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
               (identity y)
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
                  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
                  (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                               (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  ((id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @

     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))

     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)

  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; transportf
                                                (mor_disp
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 yy))
                                                (functor_id
                                                 F x)

                                                 ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      (transportf
         (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
            (FF y (HD₁ x y f yy))) (functor_id F y)
         (♯ FF
            (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
               (identity y)
               (transportf
                  (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
                  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
                  (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) ;; ♯ FF
                                               (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 yy)))) =

  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  ((id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
        (functor_id F x))
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF
                                                 ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           ((# F)%cat (identity y)) (identity (F y))
           ((# F)%cat f) (functor_id F y))
        (♯ FF
           (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
              (identity y)
              (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
                 (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
                 (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF
                                             (HD₁ x y
                                                f yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  ((id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f))
        (functor_id F x))
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF
                                                 ff))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y))
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF
                                          (HD₁ x y f
                                             yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y))
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF
                                          (HD₁ x y f
                                             yy))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y))
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF
                                          (HD₁ x y f
                                             yy))) =
?b

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
♯ FF
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy) (identity y)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
        (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF (HD₁ x y f yy) =
?t2

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
?t2 =
♯ FF
  (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy) (identity y)
     (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
        (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) ;; ♯ FF (HD₁ x y f yy)

      apply (disp_functor_comp_var FF).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
        (♯ FF
           (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
              (identity y)
              (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
                 (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
                 (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)) ;; HD₁ x y f yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (cancel_postcomposition
           ((# F)%cat (identity y)) (identity (F y))
           ((# F)%cat f) (functor_id F y)))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
        (♯ FF
           (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
              (identity y)
              (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
                 (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
                 (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)) ;; HD₁ x y f yy)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
     (♯ FF
        (cartesian_factorisation (HD₁ x y f yy)
           (identity y)
           (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
              (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
              (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)) ;; HD₁ x y f yy))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
     (♯ FF
        (transportf (mor_disp (HD₁ x y f xx) yy)
           (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
           (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (maponpaths (# F)%cat
           (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
        (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        (functor_comp F (identity y) f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (maponpaths (# F)%cat
           (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
        (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff)))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂

x, y: C₁

xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
     (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx ;; ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁

HD₂: cleaving D₂

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))

        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)

        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (functor_comp F f (identity x))
        (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx) ;; ♯ FF ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))

   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @

     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x yy))
        (! functor_comp F f (identity x))
        (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx) ;; ♯ FF ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @

   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))

   cancel_postcomposition

     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
