     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (! functor_comp F f (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (! assoc (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
          ((# F)%cat (identity x)))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)) ;; 
      ♯ FF ff)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (! functor_comp F f (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x yy))
     (! assoc (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
          ((# F)%cat (identity x)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
           (FF x yy))
        (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f)
           (identity (F y) · (# F)%cat f)
           ((# F)%cat (identity x))
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof)
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; 
         ♯ FF ff))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f)
     (identity (F y) · (# F)%cat f)
     ((# F)%cat (identity x))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   ! assoc (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
       ((# F)%cat (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (! functor_comp F f (identity x)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
        (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
        (functor_id F y)) @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x yy))
  (maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
   (id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) ;; ♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: D₁[{x}]
ff: D₁[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat f)
  (identity (F y) · (# F)%cat f)
  ((# F)%cat (identity x))
  fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
! assoc (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
    ((# F)%cat (identity x)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  (! functor_comp F f (identity x)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat (id_right f @ ! id_left f)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  (functor_comp F (identity y) f) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  (cancel_postcomposition ((# F)%cat (identity y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f) (functor_id F y)) @
assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (F y) · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
  ((# F)%cat f) (id_right (identity (F y))) =
maponpaths (compose ((# F)%cat f)) (functor_id F x) @
(id_right ((# F)%cat f) @ ! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (F y) · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
  ((# F)%cat f) (id_right (identity (F y)))

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor FF x
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f)
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
  ∙ fiber_functor FF y

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor FF x
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f)
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
  ∙ fiber_functor FF y

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) ?t

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)
 exact fiber_functor_natural_data.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) fiber_functor_natural_data
 exact fiber_functor_natural_laws.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[
identity (F y)] pr1
                  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f)
                     (FF x xx))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[
identity (F y)] pr1
                  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f)
                     (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
(# F)%cat f = identity (F y) · (# F)%cat f

    abstract
      (exact (!(id_left _))).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
fiber_functor_natural xx
· fiber_functor_natural_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor FF x
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
     xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
fiber_functor_natural xx
· fiber_functor_natural_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor FF x
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
     xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (pr1 (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (fiber_functor_natural_data xx ;; fiber_functor_natural_inv
                                      xx) =
id_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (pr1 (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))))) =
id_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (pr1 (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                            (F y)
                                            ((# F)%cat
                                               f)
                                            (FF x xx) =
id_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)) ;; 
HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (pr1 (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                            (F y)
                                            ((# F)%cat
                                               f)
                                            (FF x xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                           (F y)
                                           ((# F)%cat
                                              f)
                                           (FF x xx)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x xx))
     (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      (cartesian_factorisation
         (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
         (identity (F y))
         (transportf
            (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
             FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
            fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
            (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                               (F y)
                                               ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                               (FF x
                                                 xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   (cartesian_factorisation
      (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
      (identity (F y))
      (transportf
         (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
          FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
         fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
         (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                            (F y)
                                            ((# F)%cat
                                               f)
                                            (FF x xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
     (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (FF x xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof)
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
           (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
            z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
           (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
      ♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian FF
        (HD₁ x y f xx)) (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
         z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
      z] FF x xx) fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
   z] FF x xx)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
   z] FF x xx)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (FF x xx)) (! id_left ((# F)%cat f))
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (F y) · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
  ((# F)%cat f) (id_right (identity (F y))) =
! id_left ((# F)%cat f)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[
   z] (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
       ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx)
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv xx ;; fiber_functor_natural_data
                                     xx) =
id_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[
   z] (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
       ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx)
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv xx ;; fiber_functor_natural_data
                                     xx) =
id_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[ z] FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv xx ;; fiber_functor_natural_data
                                     xx) =
id_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[ z] FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                              FF
                                              (HD₁ x y
                                                 f xx))
                                           (identity
                                              (F y))
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                               HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               FF x xx)
                                              fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                              (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)))) =
id_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[ z] FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                              FF
                                              (HD₁ x y
                                                 f xx))
                                           (identity
                                              (F y))
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                               HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               FF x xx)
                                              fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                              (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx) =
id_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) ;; ♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F y ⟧,
   FF y (HD₁ x y f xx) -->[ z] FF y (HD₁ x y f xx))
  (id_right (identity (F y)))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                              FF
                                              (HD₁ x y
                                                 f xx))
                                           (identity
                                              (F y))
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                               HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               FF x xx)
                                              fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                              (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx)))) ;; 
♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; cartesian_factorisation
                                           (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                              FF
                                              (HD₁ x y
                                                 f xx))
                                           (identity
                                              (F y))
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                               HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                               z] 
                                               FF x xx)
                                              fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                              (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
   ♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
     (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
        ((# F)%cat f))
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
           (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                               (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                                 FF
                                                 (HD₁
                                                 x y f
                                                 xx))
                                               (identity
                                                 (F y))
                                               (transportf
                                                 (λ 
                                                 z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                 HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                 z] 
                                                 FF x
                                                 xx)
                                                 fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                                 (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                             ♯ FF
                                               (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx)))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; (cartesian_factorisation
                                            (cartesian_disp_functor_on_cartesian
                                               FF
                                               (HD₁ x
                                                 y f
                                                 xx))
                                            (identity
                                               (F y))
                                            (transportf
                                               (λ 
                                                z : 
                                                 C₂
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 F y,
                                                 F x ⟧,
                                                HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx) -->[
                                                z] 
                                                FF x
                                                 xx)
                                               fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                               (HD₂
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 xx))) ;; 
                                          ♯ FF
                                            (HD₁ x y f
                                               xx))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; transportf
                                           (λ z : 
                                               C₂
                                               ⟦ F y,
                                               F x ⟧,
                                            HD₂ (F x)
                                              (F y)
                                              ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (FF x xx) -->[
                                            z] FF x xx)
                                           fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof
                                           (HD₂ (F x)
                                              (F y)
                                              ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (FF x xx))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
        fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof)
     (cartesian_factorisation
        (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
        (identity (F y))
        (transportf
           (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
            FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
           fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
           (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                              (F y)
                                              ((# F)%cat
                                                 f)
                                              (FF x xx))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (cartesian_factorisation
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))
     (identity (F y))
     (transportf
        (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
         FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
        fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
        (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) ;; HD₂ (F x)
                                           (F y)
                                           ((# F)%cat
                                              f)
                                           (FF x xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
     fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof
     (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx)))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   FF y (pr1 (HD₁ x y f xx)) -->[ z] FF x xx)
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
     fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
   assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
     ((# F)%cat f) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (F y) · identity (F y))
     (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f)
     (id_right (identity (F y))))
  (♯ FF (pr12 (HD₁ x y f xx))) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF y (HD₁ x y f xx)) (FF x xx))
  (! id_left ((# F)%cat f)) (♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
fiber_functor_natural_inv_subproof @
maponpaths (compose (identity (F y)))
  fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof @
assoc (identity (F y)) (identity (F y)) ((# F)%cat f) @
cancel_postcomposition
  (identity (F y) · identity (F y)) (identity (F y))
  ((# F)%cat f) (id_right (identity (F y))) =
! id_left ((# F)%cat f)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_natural

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_natural

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism (fiber_functor_natural xx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
D₂[{F y}]
⟦ (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx,
(fiber_functor FF x
 ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  xx ⟧
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat (fiber_functor_natural xx) ?g

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
D₂[{F y}]
⟦ (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx,
(fiber_functor FF x
 ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  xx ⟧
 exact (fiber_functor_natural_inv xx).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat (fiber_functor_natural xx)
  (fiber_functor_natural_inv xx)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
fiber_functor_natural xx
· fiber_functor_natural_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor FF x
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
     xx)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
fiber_functor_natural_inv xx
· fiber_functor_natural xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
    ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
fiber_functor_natural xx
· fiber_functor_natural_inv xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor FF x
    ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
     xx)
 exact (fiber_functor_natural_inv_left xx).
      
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
fiber_functor_natural_inv xx
· fiber_functor_natural xx =
identity
  ((fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
    ∙ fiber_functor FF y) xx)
 exact (fiber_functor_natural_inv_right xx).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_z_iso
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_z_iso
  (fiber_functor FF x
   ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f))
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
   ∙ fiber_functor FF y)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor FF x
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f)
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
  ∙ fiber_functor FF y
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor FF x
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂ ((# F)%cat f)
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
  ∙ fiber_functor FF y
 exact fiber_functor_natural.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: cartesian_disp_functor F D₁ D₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
is_nat_z_iso fiber_functor_natural
 exact is_nat_z_iso_fiber_functor_natural.
  Defined.
End FiberFunctorNatural.

Arguments fiber_functor_natural_data {C₁ C₂ F D₁ D₂} HD₁ HD₂ FF {x y} f /.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ (FF,, HFF₁) f =
fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ (FF,, HFF₂) f


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ (FF,, HFF₁) f =
fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ (FF,, HFF₂) f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) x
          ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂
              ((# F)%cat f)
          ⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
            ∙ fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) y,
   is_nat_z_iso x0)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₁) f) =
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₂) f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) x
          ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂
              ((# F)%cat f)
          ⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
            ∙ fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) y,
   is_nat_z_iso x0)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
x0: fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) x
∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₂ HD₂
    ((# F)%cat f)
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D₁ HD₁ f
  ∙ fiber_functor (FF,, HFF₁) y
isaprop (is_nat_z_iso x0)

    apply isaprop_is_nat_z_iso.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₁) f) =
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₂) f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
∏ x0 : D₁[{x}],
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₁) f) x0 =
pr1
  (fiber_functor_natural_nat_z_iso HD₁ HD₂ 
     (FF,, HFF₂) f) x0

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
cartesian_factorisation
  (HFF₁ x y f xx (HD₁ x y f xx) 
     (HD₁ x y f xx) (HD₁ x y f xx)) 
  (identity (F y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
      z] FF x xx)
     (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) =
cartesian_factorisation
  (HFF₂ x y f xx (HD₁ x y f xx) 
     (HD₁ x y f xx) (HD₁ x y f xx)) 
  (identity (F y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
      z] FF x xx)
     (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
cartesian_factorisation
  (HFF₁ x y f xx (HD₁ x y f xx) 
     (HD₁ x y f xx) (HD₁ x y f xx)) 
  (identity (F y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
      z] FF x xx)
     (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx) =
cartesian_factorisation
  (HFF₂ x y f xx (HD₁ x y f xx) 
     (HD₁ x y f xx) (HD₁ x y f xx)) 
  (identity (F y))
  (transportf
     (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
      HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
      z] FF x xx)
     (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
     (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))) ;; 
♯ FF (HD₁ x y f xx)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
HD₁: cleaving D₁
HD₂: cleaving D₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
HFF₁, HFF₂: is_cartesian_disp_functor FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁[{x}]
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
   z] FF x xx) (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
   HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx) -->[
   z] FF x xx) (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (HD₂ (F x) (F y) ((# F)%cat f) (FF x xx))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 Transformations between fiber functors from equalities
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g


C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
nat_trans_data (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
is_nat_trans (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g) ?t

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
nat_trans_data (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
o: D[{y}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f o =
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g o

    exact (maponpaths (λ z, fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD z _) p).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
is_nat_trans (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  (λ x0 : D[{y}],
   idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD z x0) p))
 abstract
      (intros z₁ z₂ h ;
       induction p ;
       exact (id_right _ @ !(id_left _))).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
nat_z_iso (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
nat_z_iso (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g
 exact (fiber_functor_on_eq HD p).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
is_nat_z_iso (fiber_functor_on_eq HD p)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
c: D[{y}]
is_z_isomorphism (fiber_functor_on_eq HD p c)

    apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
Defined.

(**
 Lemma for composing `idtoiso` with a cartesian lift
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
p: g = f
idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
  (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (HD y x h yy)) p) ;; 
HD y x f yy =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x g yy -->[ z] yy)
  (p @ ! id_left f) (HD y x g yy)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
p: g = f
idtoiso_disp (idpath x)
  (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (HD y x h yy)) p) ;; 
HD y x f yy =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x g yy -->[ z] yy)
  (p @ ! id_left f) (HD y x g yy)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
id_disp (pr1 (HD y x g yy)) ;; HD y x g yy =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x g yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left g) (HD y x g yy)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x, y: C
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
yy: D y
transportb (mor_disp (pr1 (HD y x g yy)) yy)
  (id_left g) (HD y x g yy) =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, HD y x g yy -->[ z] yy)
  (! id_left g) (HD y x g yy)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 Transporting the object of a cartesian lift
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
f, g: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
p: f = g
ff: xx -->[ identity x] HD x x f xx
transportf
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ identity x] HD x x h xx)
  p ff =
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x g xx) (identity x)
  (ff ;; transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, HD x x f xx -->[ z] xx)
           p (HD x x f xx))


C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
f, g: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
p: f = g
ff: xx -->[ identity x] HD x x f xx
transportf
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx -->[ identity x] HD x x h xx)
  p ff =
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x g xx) (identity x)
  (ff ;; transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, HD x x f xx -->[ z] xx)
           p (HD x x f xx))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
ff: xx -->[ identity x] HD x x f xx
ff =
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x f xx) (identity x)
  (ff ;; HD x x f xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
ff: xx -->[ identity x] HD x x f xx
ff ;; HD x x f xx =
cartesian_factorisation (HD x x f xx) (identity x)
  (ff ;; HD x x f xx) ;; HD x x f xx

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
x: C
xx: D x
f: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
ff: xx -->[ identity x] HD x x f xx
ff ;; HD x x f xx = ff ;; HD x x f xx

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** Sufficient condition for being a Cartesian functor *)

C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
is_cartesian_disp_functor FF


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
is_cartesian_disp_functor FF

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y)) (FF y l) (FF y l')
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y)) (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
is_cartesian (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
(# F)%cat (identity_z_iso y) · (# F)%cat f =
(# F)%cat f
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
iso ;; ♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y l) (FF x xx)) ?p (♯ FF ff)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
(# F)%cat (identity_z_iso y) · (# F)%cat f =
(# F)%cat f
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite <- functor_comp ;
       rewrite id_left ;
       apply idpath).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
iso ;; ♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y l) (FF x xx))
  (is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof C₁
     C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
♯ FF
  (cartesian_factorisation' l' 
     (identity y) ff (id_left f)) ;; 
♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof C₁
     C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
  (♯ FF
     (cartesian_factorisation' l' 
        (identity y) ff (id_left f) ;; 
      cleaving_mor I₁ f xx)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof C₁
     C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
  (♯ FF (transportb (mor_disp yy xx) (id_left f) ff)) =
transportb (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof C₁
     C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
  (♯ FF (transportf (mor_disp yy xx) (! id_left f) ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (! is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof
       C₁ C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (functor_comp F (identity y) f)
  (transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat (! id_left f)) 
     (♯ FF ff)) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (! is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof
       C₁ C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat (! id_left f) @
   functor_comp F (identity y) f) 
  (♯ FF ff) =
transportf (mor_disp (FF y yy) (FF x xx))
  (! is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof
       C₁ C₂ F x y f) (♯ FF ff)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
D₁: disp_cat C₁
I₁: cleaving D₁
D₂: disp_cat C₂
FF: disp_functor F D₁ D₂
H: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
(yy : D₁ y),
is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f yy))
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: D₁ x
yy: D₁ y
ff: yy -->[ f] xx
Hff: is_cartesian ff
l:= yy,, ff,, Hff : cartesian_lift xx f: cartesian_lift xx f
l':= I₁ x y f xx: cartesian_lift xx f
iso:= disp_functor_on_z_iso_disp FF
  (cartesian_lifts_iso l l'): z_iso_disp
  (functor_on_z_iso F (identity_z_iso y))
  (FF y l) (FF y l')
Hff':= H y x f xx: is_cartesian (♯ FF (cleaving_mor I₁ f xx))
maponpaths (# F)%cat (! id_left f) @
functor_comp F (identity y) f =
! is_cartesian_disp_functor_chosen_lifts_subproof C₁
    C₂ F x y f

    apply homset_property.
Qed.
